# Events of the 1700s

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Ander Charmheart](<../../people/halflings/ander-charmheart.md>)                                                 |
| April 12th, 1748, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 7)*: Party meets [Centaurs](<../../creatures/species/centaurs.md>) just south of [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>), speaks to [Tharandros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/tharandros.md>). Convinces him to take his band south to Karawa. Travel towards [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 7 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-7-dufr.md>)                                                 |
| April 12th, 1748, noon                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 8)*: Find Dwarven back door to the [Dwarven Outpost (Raven's Hold)](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/dwarven-outpost-raven-s-hold.md>), and enter via tunnel.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 8 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-8-dufr.md>)                                                 |
| April 12th, 1748, late afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 10)*: Cross through tunnels underground to [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 10 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-10-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 12th, 1748, early afternoon              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 8)*: Meet [Inakara](<../../people/other-nonhumans/inakara.md>) and the twisted creatures that now make the [ruined Dwarven trading post](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/dwarven-outpost-raven-s-hold.md>) here home. Fight and kill a roper.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 8 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-8-dufr.md>)                                                 |
| April 12th, 1748, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 10)*: Kill undead hobgoblins. Kill orc and jackalwere guarding a prisoner. Free [Vola](<../../people/chardonians/vola.md>), the prisoner.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 10 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-10-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 12th, 1748, night                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 11)*: Discover a [demon](<../../people/other-nonhumans/oduk.md>)  in [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>) performing some ritual to apparently create gnolls. Kill [demon](<../../people/other-nonhumans/oduk.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 11 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-11-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 12](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-12-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 12 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-12-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 13](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 13 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748 - April 15th, 1748            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 14](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748                               | *(Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) shows the shield to a damaged dwarven stone construct guarding the outpost forge and mines; the construct recognizes or accepts its authority and lets the party pass.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/shield-of-the-brawnanvil-clan.md>)                       |
| April 13th, 1748                               | *(Charmhearts)*: Charmhearts reach [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>) with Dunmari refugees                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Charmhearts](<../../groups/halfling-families/charmhearts.md>)                                                           |
| April 13th, 1748                               | *(Akan)*: Reaches [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Akan](<../../people/dunmari/akan.md>)                                                                         |
| April 13th, 1748, dawn                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 11)*: Awake after a night of disturbing dreams.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 11 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-11-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 12)*: Kill many gnolls in [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>), eventually clearing the threat. Have breakfast.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 12 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-12-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, late morning                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 13)*: Explore [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>) and recover treasure.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 13 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, noon                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 13)*: Find and destroys some demon-cursed plant creature near a summoning circle outside of Raven's Hold, watch poisoned water be washed away. Careful searching turns up little but a [scroll cap from a scroll case](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/ivory-scroll-case.md>). Set a bunch of penned animals free.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 13 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 13)*: Pass through [Dwarven Outpost (Raven's Hold)](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/dwarven-outpost-raven-s-hold.md>), explore mines, and speak with strange giant metal construct of dwarvish origin.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 13 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 13)*: Camp near road to Karawa.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 13 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-13-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1748, night                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 14)*: Discussion and dinner. Plans are made to travel west to the strange permanent storm on the plains.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 14th, 1748                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 14)*: Travel across the [plains](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/samtal.md>) towards the lightning storm.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 15](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-15-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 15 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-15-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748 - April 16th, 1748            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 16](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-16-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 16 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-16-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 14)*: Travel across the [plains](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/samtal.md>) towards the lightning storm.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748, late afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 14)*: Arrive at the lightning storm. [Vola](<../../people/chardonians/vola.md>) remains outside at camp with the horses and heavy gear.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748, early evening                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 14)*: Party pushes through the storm, arriving at [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>). Find remains of a Chardonian adventuring party camp, before night begins to fall and party realizes stars are changed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 14 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-14-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748, late evening                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 15)*: Investigate [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>). Meet [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>), the trapped storm giant, missing his eyes, and speak with him in his dreamscape.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 15 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-15-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1748, night                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 16)*: Continue exploring [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>). Fight a water guardian, dislodge a strange iron orrery, and find treasure and information. Flee as [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>)'s mind slips back into madness and the storm intensifies. Stagger through the storm through the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 16 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-16-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 16th, 1748 - April 24th, 1748            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 17](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 16th, 1748                               | *(Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) parts ways with the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) after [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>) and heads home to [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>) with the Brawnanvil clan artifacts.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/shield-of-the-brawnanvil-clan.md>)                       |
| April 16th, 1748, early morning                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 16)*: Stumble out of the permanent storm around [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>). Part ways with [Vola](<../../people/chardonians/vola.md>) and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), who depart for [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) and [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>), respectively.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 16 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-16-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 16th, 1748, late morning                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 17)*: Leave [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>) heading towards Karawa.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 16th, 1748, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 17)*: Kill a group of emaciated and nearly undead gnolls on the plains.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 17th, 1748 - April 23th, 1748            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 17)*: Travel south towards [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 18th, 1748                               | *(Alesh)*: Returns to [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Alesh](<../../people/dunmari/alesh.md>)                                                                       |
| April 22th, 1748                               | [Ivory Scroll Cap Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/ivory-scroll-cap-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Ivory Scroll Cap Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/ivory-scroll-cap-vision.md>)                                   |
| April 22th, 1748                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 17)*: See a vision of the [Ivory Scroll Case](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/ivory-scroll-case.md>) found at [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Ivory Scroll Cap Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/ivory-scroll-cap-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 22th, 1748                               | *(Dee Wildcloak)*: Dee Wildcloak and Dain Goldhammer arrive in Chardon with [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>) and the [Binding Stones](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/binding-stones.md>), and give them to [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Dee Wildcloak](<../../people/halflings/dee-wildcloak.md>)                                                       |
| April 24th, 1748                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 18](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-18-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 18 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-18-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 24th, 1748 - June 3rd, 1748              | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| April 24th, 1748                               | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: A strange meteor crashes in [Yuvanti Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/yuvanti-mountains.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| April 24th, 1748                               | *(Fraternity of the Empty Moon)*: The [Fraternity of the Empty Moon](<../../groups/fraternity-of-the-empty-moon.md>) arrives in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>), and begins to set up a secret lair.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Fraternity of the Empty Moon](<../../groups/fraternity-of-the-empty-moon.md>)                         |
| April 24th, 1748, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 17)*: Arrive at [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>).  Here news of gnoll attack from an exhausted [Candrosa](<../../people/dunmari/candrosa.md>). Learns news of the south from [Alesh](<../../people/dunmari/alesh.md>), including an [orc](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) scouting party, a mysterious empty stone house, and another band of emaciated gnolls heading south and west into the [Garamjala Desert](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/garamjala-desert.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 17 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-17-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 24th, 1748, late afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 18)*: Discuss [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) Dustmother, the gnolls, and the events of the past month with [Candrosa], who is distracted, worried, and nervous, especially when the topic of [Shakun's Protection](<../../gods-and-religions/religions/five-siblings/shakun-s-protection.md>) comes up.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 18 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-18-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 24th, 1748, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 18)*: Discuss the metaphysics of other planes and [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) Dustmother with [Tharandros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/tharandros.md>). Decide to travel east with [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 18 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-18-dufr.md>)                                               |

| April 25th, 1748 - April 26th, 1748            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Make preparations in Karawa to head east with Havdar and his warriors                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 26th, 1748                               | *(Riswynn)*: Riswynn arrives in Tokra.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>)                                                                   |
