| April 27th, 1748                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Vision of Kenzo's [shard of jade](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>) seen in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Kenzo's Jade Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/kenzo-s-jade-vision.md>)  recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 27th, 1748                               | *(Amil)*: *(Amil)*: Arrives in Bas Udda to tend the unburied dead from the gnoll attacks                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>)                                                                         |
| April 27th, 1748, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Depart Karawa with [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s warriors                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 28th, 1748                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Travel southeast towards [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 29th, 1748, mid-morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Arrive in [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>). Meet [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>), an apprentice monk who is burning and giving last rites to bodies left untended after the gnoll attack. Fend of giant vultures. [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>) surprised to see [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and mentioned his masters [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>) and [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>) saved an elf in the desert some months ago.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 29th, 1748                               | *(Amil)*: *(Amil)*: Meets [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>) and [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>), who aid him in his task.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>)                                                                         |
| April 29th, 1748                               | *(Drikod)*: Drikod leaves [Kunda](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/kunda.md>), his village in the mountains.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Drikod](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/drikod.md>)                                                                     |
| April 29th, 1748, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Spend night in[Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 30th, 1748                               | *(Amil)*: *(Amil)*: Leaves Bas Udda with The Dunmar Fellowship, traveling to his masters' house in the desert                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>)                                                                         |
| April 30th, 1748                               | *(Riswynn)*: Riswynn arrives in Askandi.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>)                                                                   |
| April 30th, 1748, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Help [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>) tend the dead of [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 30th, 1748, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Leave [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>) with Amil, parting ways with [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 1st, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Travel with [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>) through the desert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 2nd, 1748 - May 5th, 1748                  | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 20](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 2nd, 1748                                  | *(Amil)*: *(Amil)*: Arrives at Pava and Avaras' House with The Dunmar Fellowship.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>)                                                                         |
| May 2nd, 1748                                  | *(Avaras)*: Delwath returns and [meets Avaras again](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>), with the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>)                                                                     |
| May 2nd, 1748, midday                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Fight ogres in the desert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 2nd, 1748, afternoon                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Speak with [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>) and [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>) about [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), [Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/dunmari-pantheon/bhishma.md>), the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>), and the [Monastery of Bhishma](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/monastery-of-bhishma.md>) near [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>). [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>)'s [old armor](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/delwath-s-elven-breastplate.md>) is returned. Learn about attempt by Order some 30 years ago to heal the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>), which failed badly. Learn of [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>), a master that did not travel east, now rumored to live north of [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 2nd, 1748, evening                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 19)*: Arrive at the stone house that is the home of [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>) and [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 19 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-19-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 2nd, 1748, evening                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Have dinner with Avaras, Pava, and Amil. Spend the night at [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1748                                  | *(Vetta)*: [Urgall the Black](<../../people/skaer/urgall-the-black.md>) landed on Vetta, and attacked. He and his crew slaughtered the pilgrims who were there, and the staff, and finally the priest of the waters, and then plundered the island. As they did so, they were cursed by [Kaikkea](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/kaikkea.md>), making it impossible for them to depart.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Vetta](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/vetta.md>)                                                                       |
| May 3rd, 1748                                  | *(Flaming Tempest):* Arrives at Vetta
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Flaming Tempest](<../../things/ships/flaming-tempest.md>)                                                   |
| May 3rd, 1748, morning                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Train with [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>) and [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1748, afternoon                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Leave the [stone house](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>) for Havdar's camp in the desert to the east.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 4th, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Travel across the [Nashtkar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/nashtkar.md>) towards Havdar's camp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1748 - May 11th, 1748                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 21](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1748                                  | *(Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) arrives in [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>) with the shield, and returns it to the clan elders.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Shield of the Brawnanvil Clan](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/shield-of-the-brawnanvil-clan.md>)                       |
| May 5th, 1748                                  | *(Riswynn)*: Riswynn arrives in Tharn Todor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>)                                                                   |
| May 5th, 1748, early evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 20)*: Arrive at [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s camp. Help fight off [orc](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) attack.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 20 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-20-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1748, evening                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Interrogate the orc survivor [Gorkil](<../../people/orcs/gorkil.md>) in [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s camp, who rants about being a servant of [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>), the Blighted One, and that [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>)'s protection means he will rise stronger if he is killed. Eventually commands [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) to kill him, ending the interrogation. Funeral for members of [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s band who died; [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>) passes [a magical bowstring](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/flaming-bowstring.md>) to Wellby. Meet [Aram](<../../people/dunmari/aram.md>), a member of [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s band who can heal with a touch.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 6th, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Leave Havdar's camp, heading south, to approach the [Monastery of Bhishma](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/monastery-of-bhishma.md>) while avoiding approaching Kharsan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 7th, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Travel south through the desert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 8th, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Travel south through the desert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 9th, 1748                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Travel south through the desert, slowing pace to try to move unseen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 9th, 1748                                  | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) meets [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) and [Agnor](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/agnor.md>) at [The Red Shield](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/the-red-shield.md>)and learns of strange happenings below Tharn Todor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| May 10th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Get slightly lost, and head further south into the [Garamjala](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/garamjala-desert.md>) than planned prior to turning east. Find dry riverbed of the [Kharja](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/kharja.md>) and a place to camp, well south of Kharsan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 10th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>), and [Agnor](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/agnor.md>) defeat a haunted slime monster in mines beneath Tharn Todor and discover the ancient remains of the aboleth [Xeron](<../../people/other-nonhumans/xeron.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| May 11th, 1748                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 22](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-22-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 22 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-22-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748, mid-afternoon                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 22)*: Enter common hall of the monastery, find initiation chamber. Kenzo and Seeker proceed down hallway illuminating the history of [Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/dunmari-pantheon/bhishma.md>) and her miracles. Kenzo becomes initiate of [the Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/dunmari-pantheon/bhishma.md>) Mystai, known as the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>), dying and being revived during the process.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 22 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-22-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 23](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-23-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 23 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-23-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748 - May 13th, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 24](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>), and [Agnor](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/agnor.md>) return to [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| May 11th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 21)*: Turn north to approach Kharsan via the dry [Kharja](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/kharja.md>). Rest south of the city while Wellby scouts ahead through the eyes of a desert hawk.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 21 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-21-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748, midday                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 22)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) returns to camp. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) tells party about Rai, his jade fragment, and their connection to the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>) and [Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/dunmari-pantheon/bhishma.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 22 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-22-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748, early afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 22)*: Investigate [monastery](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/monastery-of-bhishma.md>). Fight and kill a manticore family. Fight an [orc](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) patrol, killing most and capturing one. Interrogate [orc](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>), learning that the only other things in [the monastery](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/monastery-of-bhishma.md>) are ghosts; that [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>) keeps a patrol here to report anything suspicious; and that [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>)'s armies are strong and will defeat [Uzgash's bastards](<../../groups/orc-hordes/people-of-the-rainbow.md>) soon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 22 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-22-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 23)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) return and share [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>)'s vision hinting that the [Heart of Shakun](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/heart-of-shakun.md>) is missing from [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>). Explore, learning the history of the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>)by controlling the chaotic memories contained in [the Hall of Stories](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/hall-of-stories.md>). Meet the ghost of [Karmana](<../../people/dunmari/karmana.md>), the last master of the monastery. Learn that [Sajan](<../../people/dunmari/sajan.md>), the keeper of stories, went mad long ago, trapped in evil dreams in the [Hall of Stories](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/hall-of-stories.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 23 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-23-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Depart [Hall of Stories](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/hall-of-stories.md>), explore the Temple of Bhishma. Find shadows lurking, and retreat to camp for the evening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 12th, 1748, mid-morning                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Flee south, hoping confuse anyone tracking them in the desert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 12th, 1748                                 | *(Drikod)*: Drikod arrives in Karawa.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Drikod](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/drikod.md>)                                                                     |
| May 12th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Awake to realization that the [orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) killed and imprisoned the day before have revived and escaped, bringing news to Grash.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 12th, 1748, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Turn west. Camp for the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |

| May 13th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Depart camp heading north and east, back towards Kharsan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 13th, 1748, late morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 24)*: Arrive at road and canyon of the Samraat Tombs. Hide horses and gear. [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) scouts [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>) while invisible; [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) spies with clairvoyance on [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 24 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-24-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 13th, 1748, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 25)*: Spotted by [orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) while trying to sneak back to shelter of the Samraat Tombs canyon. [Orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) give chase. Ride fast for [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s camp.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 25 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-25-dufr.md>)                                               |

| May 14th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: A strange, almost angelic humanoid staggers down the mountain and speaks to [Ken-to](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ken-to.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |

Spend night with [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>), [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>), and [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 25 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-25-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 18th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Ken-to](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ken-to.md>) arrives in [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>), gives [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) news of the strange meteor and wounded [angelic creature](<../../creatures/extraplanar/deva.md>), and asks for help.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |

| May 19th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), [Ken-to](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ken-to.md>), and [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) travel to [Ken-to](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ken-to.md>)'s hut to investigate situation, and defeat a devil who is trying to summon more fiends.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
