| May 23th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 26)*: Reach [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>). Speak with centaur patrols. Meet [Drikod](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/drikod.md>). Hear story of [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>) and Shakun's Heart from apologetic and floundering [Candrosa](<../../people/dunmari/candrosa.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 26 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-26-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 24th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 26)*: Gather supplies in [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 26 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-26-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 24th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 26)*: dusk: Ritual of Shakun's Initiation. [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) notices the mesa is crumbling. Attacked by shadows at conclusion of initiation ritual.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 26 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-26-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 24th, 1748 - May 27th, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 27](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 27 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 24th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 27)*: Funeral for mysai killed by shadows. Learn about the web of connections between initiates that powers the magic of Shakun that keeps [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) safe, using Shakun's Heart and the [Temple of Shakun](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/temple-of-shakun.md>) as a focus. Decide to leave for [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>) in the morning.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 27 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 25th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 27)*: Depart Karawa, heading across the [Red Mesa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/red-mesa.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 27 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 26th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 27)*: Travel across the [Red Mesa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/red-mesa.md>) all day.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 27 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 27th, 1748                                 | [Mawar Adventures](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/mawar-adventures.md>). Started in DR 1747, currently . Episodic campaign with minimal links between episodes and no firm conclusion, so potentially still active. Five episodes run so far. Fixed at level 6. Campaign code: mawar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Campaign Inventory                                             |
| May 27th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 27)*: late afternoon. Arrive at a circle of stone trees, the entrance to [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>). Find it guarded by gnolls, most of whom look skeletal and wasted away. Sneak south and begin to descend steep cliff walls with magic. Meet [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>). Nearly discovered by [Samerki](<../../people/other-nonhumans/samerki.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 27 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-27-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 27th, 1748 - May 29th, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 28](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 28 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 27th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 28)*: Finally safely reach the canyon floor, with the aid of [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>)'s magic and the power of the [Heart of Shakun](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/heart-of-shakun.md>). Speak with [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>). Make plans.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 28 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 28th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 28)*: Hide in [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>). [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>) tells [Samerki](<../../people/other-nonhumans/samerki.md>) that [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) must bring [Jumi](<../../people/dunmari/jumi.md>) here.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 28 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 29th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 28)*: Hide in [Shakun's Realm](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/shakun-s-realm.md>), entered via [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 28 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 29th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 28)*: dusk: Emerge from [Shakun's Realm](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/shakun-s-realm.md>), alerted by [Jumi](<../../people/dunmari/jumi.md>). Fight and kill [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) Dustmother and [Samerki](<../../people/other-nonhumans/samerki.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 28 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-28-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 29th, 1748 - June 1st, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 29](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 29th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) speak with some dwarven merchants, and leave [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>) to investigate bandits.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| May 29th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: Cure [Jumi](<../../people/dunmari/jumi.md>) of [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>)'s curse with skillful use of dispel magic by [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>). Attacked by gnolls emerging from slot canyon entrance to [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>). Recover many magic items from [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>), including the [Scepter of Command](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/scepter-of-command.md>). Spend the night at [Shakun’s Wellspring](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/shakuns-wellspring.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 30th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: Depart for [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>) in the morning, with [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>) and [Jumi](<../../people/dunmari/jumi.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 31th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: Travel across the [Red Mesa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/red-mesa.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 31th, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) meet [Ghemdorn](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ghemdorn.md>) and [Eva](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/eva.md>), defeat bandits, talk to [Jenny Honeypot](<../../people/halflings/jenny-honeypot.md>), explore a cultist's cave, and rescue [Mica Honeypot](<../../people/halflings/mica-honeypot.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |

| June 1st, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: See a vision of the history of the [Scepter of Command](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/scepter-of-command.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Scepter of Command Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/scepter-of-command-vision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |

| June 1st, 1748                                 | *(Oskar in Tharn Todor)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Oskar](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/oskar.md>) part ways with [Ghemdorn](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/ghemdorn.md>) and [Eva](<../../people/pcs/other-pcs/oskar-s-companions/eva.md>) in the morning, to begin their journey back.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Oskar in Tharn Todor](<../../campaigns/one-shots/oskar-s-adventures/oskar-in-tharn-todor.md>)                                         |
| June 1st, 1748                                 | *(Belegor)*: Belegor met the green dragon [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>), who was posing as an [elf](<../../creatures/species/elves.md>), [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>), at the time, in [the Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Belegor](<../../people/elves/belegor.md>)                                                                   |
| June 1st, 1748, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: Arrive in [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>). [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>) immediately vanishes to help restore Shakun's Heart.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 1st, 1748, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 29)*: Speak with a grateful [Candrosa](<../../people/dunmari/candrosa.md>). Talk to [Tharandros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/tharandros.md>) and receive gifts. Talk to [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>), learning recent news of Karawa.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 29 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-29-dufr.md>)                                               |

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Garret Tealeaf](<../../people/halflings/garret-tealeaf.md>)                                                     |

Camp.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 30 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-30-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 4th, 1748, night                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 31)*: Attacked by [orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>), seemingly associated with [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>), looking to recover gold and treasure. [Orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) are driven off, but manage to escape with some treasure.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 31 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-31-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 5th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 31)*: Travel north to [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 31 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-31-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 5th, 1748, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 31)*: Hide some treasure from [Agata's Lair](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/agata-s-lair.md>) in [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>). Free [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>)'s prisoners imprisoned in living wood.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 31 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-31-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 6th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 31)*: Depart [Bas Udda](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/bas-udda.md>) for [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>). Destroy a few particularly evil magic items from [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) before crossing [Shakun's Protection](<../../gods-and-religions/religions/five-siblings/shakun-s-protection.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 31 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-31-dufr.md>)                                               |

| June 8th, 1748                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: [Nayan Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) is freed from Agata's [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>) and begins contemplating her future.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |

| June 8th, 1748, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 31)*: Arrive in [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>). Speak with [Cintra](<../../people/dunmari/cintra.md>). Free prisoners from the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>), including [Nayan Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>), the sister of the current ruler of [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 31 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-31-dufr.md>)                                               |

| June 9th, 1748 - June 10th, 1748               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) gathers rumors and closes his affairs in town; [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and [Drikod](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/drikod.md>) prepare for Shakun’s initiation; [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) trains [Baxter](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/companions/baxter.md>); [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) studies treasure.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 11th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In Karawa, Delwath gathers rumors and closes his affairs in town; Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation; Seeker studies treasure. Wellby town with [Havdar's Warband](<../../groups/havdar-s-warband.md>) for Bas Udda to recover treasure left there.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 12th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In Karawa, Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation while Seeker and Delwath unlock more secrets of the mirror of soul trapping. Wellby travels with [Havdar's Warband](<../../groups/havdar-s-warband.md>) towards Bas Udda.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 13th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In Karawa, Delwath gathers rumors and closes his affairs in town; Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation; Seeker tours the [Red Mesa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/red-mesa.md>) and the [Temple of Shakun](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/temple-of-shakun.md>) with Candrosa. Wellby arrives in Bas Udda with [Havdar's Warband](<../../groups/havdar-s-warband.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 14th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>), Delwath gathers rumors and closes his affairs in town; Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation; Seeker studies treasure. Wellby leaves Bas Udda with [Havdar's Warband](<../../groups/havdar-s-warband.md>), returning to [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 15th, 1748                                | [Soul Lantern Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/soul-lantern-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Soul Lantern Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/soul-lantern-vision.md>)                                           |
| June 15th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In Karawa, Delwath gathers rumors and closes his affairs in town; Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation; Seeker studies treasure.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 15th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: Agata's [Soul Lantern](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/soul-lantern.md>) viewed in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Soul Lantern Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/soul-lantern-vision.md>). recharge mirror.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 15th, 1748                                | *(Akan)*: Returns to [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>) from [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>), for the [Feast of Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/holidays-and-festivals/dunmari-festivals/feast-of-bhishma.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Akan](<../../people/dunmari/akan.md>)                                                                         |
| June 15th, 1748, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: Wellby returns to Karawa. [Revaka](<../../people/other-nonhumans/revaka.md>) interrogated in the Mirror of Soul Trapping.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 16th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: In Karawa, Delwath gathers supplies and speaks with the party in the evening; Kenzo and Drikod prepare for Shakun’s initiation; Seeker studies treasure; Wellby trains with Baxter and works on his map.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 17th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: Delwath travels into the desert at first light. Kenzo and Drikod are initiated into the Shakun Mystai. Seeker studies treasure. Wellby trains with Baxter and works on his map.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 18th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: [Feast of Bhishma](<../../gods-and-religions/holidays-and-festivals/dunmari-festivals/feast-of-bhishma.md>) begins in Karawa. Delwath returns from the desert at first light. Soul Lantern destroyed by Cintra during the remembrance prayers. Living Wood destroyed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 19th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: Feast of Bhishma continues with a day of rest and celebration. [Nayan Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) announces herself to the Dunmari of Karawa.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |

| June 20th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Travel west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 20th, 1748, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 32)*: Drikod leaves Karawa, heading north towards his home village of [Kunda](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/kunda.md>). Kenzo, Seeker, Wellby, and Delwath, traveling with Garrett Tealeaf, leave Karawa heading west for Tokra.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 32 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-32-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 21th, 1748                                | [Floating Disc Coin Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/floating-disc-coin-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Floating Disc Coin Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/floating-disc-coin-vision.md>)                               |
| June 21th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Travel uneventfully west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Discuss the possible evils of magic items with [Garret Tealeaf](<../../people/halflings/garret-tealeaf.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 21th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: See a vision of the [Floating Disc Coin](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/floating-disc-coin.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Floating Disc Coin Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/floating-disc-coin-vision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 22th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Travel west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Seeker contacted telepathically by [Typhina](<../../people/fey/typhina.md>), a native of the feywild trapped in the ring recovered from [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>). Much later, the party will learn this is actually [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>), playing a role.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 22th, 1748                                | *(Akan)*: Returns to nomadic lifestyle traveling north and east of [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>) with his extended family and his diminished sheep herds.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Akan](<../../people/dunmari/akan.md>)                                                                         |
| June 23th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Travel uneventfully west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 24th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Travel west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Stop to examine the ruins of ancient Drankorian aqueduct along the [Stoneway](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/stoneway.md>), with a lingering enchantment to purify water, and increase it, duplicating what is already flowing. Meet a family of Dunmari goat herders camped for a few days near the aqueduct. Stay the afternoon and evening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 25th, 1748 - June 29th, 1748              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Continue west towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 28th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Use the Mirror of the Past to see a dried scorpion taken from [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>), and watch is begin to come alive in the magic of the mirror: [Dried Scorpion Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/dried-scorpion-vision.md>). Wellby shoots it before it can fully transform. recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
