| June 30th, 1748 - July 1st, 1748               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 34](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-34-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 34 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-34-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 30th, 1748                                | *(Charmhearts)*: Meet [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>), receive gifts from him to help get them on their feet again. Introduced to [Garret Tealeaf](<../../people/halflings/garret-tealeaf.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Charmhearts](<../../groups/halfling-families/charmhearts.md>)                                                           |
| June 30th, 1748, early afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 33)*: Arrive at the outskirts of Tokra. Cross the bridge, pay the toll. [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) takes Garrett to the halfling inn in town, [The Red Lily Inn](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/the-red-lily-inn.md>). Rest of party continues south to the [Lakan Monastery](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/lakan-monastery.md>),  where they are welcomed by an ancient monk, [Rishi](<../../people/dunmari/rishi.md>), [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>)'s master and teacher.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 33 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-33-dufr.md>)                                               |
| June 30th, 1748, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 34)*: Speak with [Rishi](<../../people/dunmari/rishi.md>) at the[Lakan Monastery](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/lakan-monastery.md>). Meet [Basu](<../../people/dunmari/basu.md>) at dinner, who gripes about the overflowing energy of Arborea in the elven ruins below the Lakan monastery. Meet [Kassi](<../../people/dunmari/kassi.md>), the head librarian at the monastery. Dinner discuss events in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>) with [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>), Kenzo's old friend. Spend the night at the monastery.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 34 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-34-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 35](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 35 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748 - July 2nd, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 36](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748                                 | *(Belegor)*: . Belegor fled from [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>), realizing his deception.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Belegor](<../../people/elves/belegor.md>)                                                                   |
| July 1st, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 34)*: Enter [ancient elven ruins](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/elven-arborea-workshop.md>). Defeat slimes and oozes and confront massive velvet worm near the [Extraplanar Weak Point](<../../cosmology/planar-concepts/extraplanar-weak-point.md>), which is tamed by Seeker's magic. Return to surface with three vials filled with the essence of [Arborea](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/arborea.md>)'s extraplanar energy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 34 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-34-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, midday                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 35)*: Speak with [Basu](<../../people/dunmari/basu.md>), agree to exchange magical energy from ruins for a [Portable Hole](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/portable-hole.md>). Speak with [Kassi](<../../people/dunmari/kassi.md>), ask for informaiton.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 35 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 35)*: Leave monastery and get rooms at [Kirian's](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/kirian-s.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 35 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 35)*: Speak with [Kaleha](<../../people/dunmari/kaleha.md>), revealing [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>)'s story. Speak with [Ardan](<../../people/dunmari/ardan.md>) at the [Archives](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/archives.md>), and learn more about recent events; [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>), the missing archivist; and [Hada](<../../people/dunmari/hada.md>), the head scribe. Find clues in the form of records of [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>)'s research.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 35 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, early evening                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 35)*: Have dinner  at [Kirian's](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/kirian-s.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 35 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-35-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, late evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 36)*: Return to [Archives](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/archives.md>). Stand guard as the full moon rises. Hear a howl from below. Investigate, meeting the [Hardstones](<../../groups/dwarven-clans/hardstones.md>), including [Dag Hardstone](<../../people/dwarves/dag-hardstone.md>), who has been cursed with lycanthropy. After subduing Dag, [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) restores him with a ritual                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 1st, 1748, night                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 36)*: [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) sleep at the [Archives](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/archives.md>); [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) returns to the monastery to ensure the [Lakan mystai](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/lakan-mystai.md>) are safe.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 37](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-37-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 37 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-37-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748 - July 3rd, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 38](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-38-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 38 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-38-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748                                 | Recovered by the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) from the lair of the [Fraternity of the Empty Moon](<../../groups/fraternity-of-the-empty-moon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Pandemonium Scroll](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/pandemonium-scroll.md>)                                             |
| July 2nd, 1748                                 | *(Amay)*: Briefly encounters [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) in Tokra while escorting them to [Illyan](<../../people/dunmari/illyan.md>)'s camp.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Amay](<../../people/dunmari/amay.md>)                                                                         |
| July 2nd, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 36)*: Meet at [Darshana's Caravanserai](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/darshana-s-caravanserai.md>) after breakfast; speak with [Darshana](<../../people/dunmari/darshana.md>). Learn that [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>) may have vanished searching near an abandoned fort guarding a place of strange, cursed magic of madness from [Ashar](<../../people/dunmari/ashar.md>), a Dunmari veteran.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 36)*: Return to [Kirian's](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/kirian-s.md>). Asked to visit Dunmari army camp and speak with [Illyan](<../../people/dunmari/illyan.md>), the commander. Attempt to spy with clairvoyance, but are detected. Narrowly avoid severe punishment after [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) admits to the spying; conscripted to get a message to [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) to try to prevent war. Use scroll of Sending.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748, early afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 36)*: Leave north to look for [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>), but decide to investigate the abandoned Drankorian fort first. Discover tracks, leading to a hidden tunnel, enter, follow tunnel to a door. Delwath's looks through the door with his newfound powers, and see hideous statues. Open door, as the statues come alive.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 36 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-36-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 37)*: Fight animated statue guards. Explore underground lair of [Fraternity of the Empty Moon](<../../groups/fraternity-of-the-empty-moon.md>). Rescue [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>). Find the dead body of [Hada](<../../people/dunmari/hada.md>), the head scribe, killed apparently by [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>) while in a lycanthropic rage. Kill 10 werewolves, including the leader.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 37 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-37-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 38)*: Search bodies. More werewolves attack. [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Vistra Fireforge](<../../people/dwarves/vistra-fireforge.md>), tracking the werewolves, arrive and join the fight. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) wounded, cured of suspected lycanthropy by [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>). Search the lair, finding notes and clues, a [Dunmari map of Pandemonium ruins](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/dunmari-map-of-pandemonium-ruins.md>) ,and other treasures, despite setting off a dangerous trap.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 38 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-38-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 2nd, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 38)*: Return [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>) to [Archives](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/archives.md>). Speak with [Kaleha](<../../people/dunmari/kaleha.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 38 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-38-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 39](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-39-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 39 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-39-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748 - July 6th, 1748                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 40](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748                                 | The [Destruction of the Werewolf Cult](<1748/07/destruction-of-the-werewolf-cult.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Destruction of the Werewolf Cult](<1748/07/destruction-of-the-werewolf-cult.md>)                 |
| July 3rd, 1748                                 | *(Fraternity of the Empty Moon)*: The [Destruction of the Werewolf Cult](<1748/07/destruction-of-the-werewolf-cult.md>) by [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Fraternity of the Empty Moon](<../../groups/fraternity-of-the-empty-moon.md>)                         |
| July 3rd, 1748                                 | *(Blue)*: Blue heads north towards [Lake Valandros](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/lake-valandros.md>) and the frontier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>)                                                                         |
| July 3rd, 1748, dawn                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 39)*: Search for remaining signs of werewolves, returning to the werewolf lair. Follow secret tunnel back to the ruined Drankorian fort.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 39 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-39-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 39)*: Use clairvoyance, and scout area, spotting several guards. Stealthy approach is foiled by unstealthy dwarves. Fight werewolves, forcing two to surrender; suicide of third werewolf summons a cursed avatar of some kind from [Pandemonium](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/pandemonium.md>). Kill it. Interrogate captives.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 39 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-39-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748, late morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 39)*: Return with the captives to [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Leave captives with [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>); Kenzo, [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) gather gear for the journey north to find [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 39 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-39-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 40)*: Depart [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Travel uneventfully north along the [Hara](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/rivers/hara-watershed/hara.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 3rd, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 40)*: Camp on the [~North Tokra Plains~](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/north-tokra-plains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 4th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 40)*: Travel north. Meet [Kiran](<../../people/dunmari/kiran.md>), speak of [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>) and the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>). Continue north; spend the night on the plains.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 5th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 40)*: Travel north.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 6th, 1748 - July 13th, 1748               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 41](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 6th, 1748, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 40)*: Approach [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>)'s camp. Meet and speak with [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>), learning more about the [Order of the Awakened Soul](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/order-of-the-awakened-soul.md>) and the [Awakened Soul Disaster](<1718/awakened-soul-disaster.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 40 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-40-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 6th, 1748, early afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Leave [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>)'s camp. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) gifted scrolls for collecting stories, and [Saka](<../../people/dunmari/saka.md>) urges him to take his duties as a mystai of Bhishma seriously. Travel south to [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 7th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Travel south to [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 8th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Travel south to [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 8th, 1748, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Arrive in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Reunite with [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) at [Kirian's](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/kirian-s.md>) for dinner. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) listens to [Kirian](<../../people/dunmari/kirian.md>)'s life [story](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/collected-stories/kirian-s-story.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 9th, 1748                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Speak with [Hardstones](<../../groups/dwarven-clans/hardstones.md>) and with [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>) at the [archives](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/archives.md>). Speak with [Kaleha](<../../people/dunmari/kaleha.md>). Monsoon rains arrive in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). Move to monastery.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 10th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: [Day of Renewal](<../../gods-and-religions/holidays-and-festivals/dunmari-festivals/day-of-renewal.md>). Spend the night at the monastery.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 11th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Speak with [Kassi](<../../people/dunmari/kassi.md>) about [Rai](<../../people/pcs/great-war/rai.md>), dead gods, and [Yezali](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/yezali.md>). Rest at monastery.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 12th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Rest at monastery.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 13th, 1748                                | The [Pandemonium Scroll Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/pandemonium-scroll-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Pandemonium Scroll Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/pandemonium-scroll-vision.md>)                               |
| July 13th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 41)*: Speaker [Lara](<../../people/dunmari/lara.md>) returns. Discuss situation in [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) and [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>). Agree to escort [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>) to [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 41 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-41-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 13th, 1748 - July 18th, 1748              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 42](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 13th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Spend time in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 13th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Examine the [Pandemonium Scroll](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/pandemonium-scroll.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>) and see the [Pandemonium Scroll Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/pandemonium-scroll-vision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 14th, 1748, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Visit the giant tree of [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 14th, 1748, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Restock and resupply. Sell treasure in Tokra. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) receives a branch from the giant tree from [Rishi](<../../people/dunmari/rishi.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 15th, 1748, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Receive portable hole, as well as instructions on its care and use, from [Basu](<../../people/dunmari/basu.md>). Finalize business in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 16th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: morning. Depart [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>), heading west, with [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 16th, 1748                                | *(Mabist)*: Mabist wakes up in Dinia's cottage in the mountains.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Mabist](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/mabist.md>)                                                                     |
| July 16th, 1748, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Spend the night at a roadside caravanserai a day's journey west of [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 17th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Travel west along the [Stoneway](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/stoneway.md>). Spend the night at a caravanserai.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
