| July 18th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Travel west along the [Stoneway](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/stoneway.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 18th, 1748                                | *(Charmhearts)*: [Garret Tealeaf](<../../people/halflings/garret-tealeaf.md>) and the Charmhearts leave [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>), planning on heading to [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>) with trade goods and reconnecting with the Tealeafs, if possible.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Charmhearts](<../../groups/halfling-families/charmhearts.md>)                                                           |
| July 18th, 1748, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 42)*: Arrive at the crossroads where the [Tokra-Darba Road](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/tokra-darba-road.md>) turn south and west.  Spend the night at the [~Crossroads Caravanserai~](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/crossroads-caravanserai.md>). Speak with the [Greenleafs](<../../groups/halfling-families/greenleafs.md>), who report on rumors of a dragon on the road. Speak with [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 42 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-42-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 19th, 1748 - July 23th, 1748              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 43](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 19th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Travel along the [Tokra-Darba Road](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/tokra-darba-road.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 19th, 1748, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Depart [~Crossroads Caravanserai~](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/crossroads-caravanserai.md>) heading towards [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>) on the [Tokra-Darba Road](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/tokra-darba-road.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 19th, 1748, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Reach [Akela Inn](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/akela-inn.md>), the last inn on the road before the [Copper Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/darba-highlands/copper-hills.md>). Speak with [Amar](<../../people/dunmari/amar.md>), the innkeeper. Gather rumors. Spend the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 20th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Travel along the [Tokra-Darba Road](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/tokra-darba-road.md>) a fast pace, covering 30 miles of increasingly hilly road.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 21th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Approach the hilly terrain that marks the [Copper Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/darba-highlands/copper-hills.md>). Discover a bandit ambush, and ambush the ambushers. Intimidate and bribe them into fighting the rumored dragon together. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) listens to the story of [Justan](<../../people/dunmari/justan.md>), the captain of this raiding party. Camp for the night in the midst of the [Copper Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/darba-highlands/copper-hills.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 22th, 1748                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Uneventful, but watchful, trek at a slower, more careful pace through the hills. Camp for the evening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748                                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 44](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-44-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 44 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-44-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, mid-afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 44)*: Confront [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>) and company. Bitter conversation after a short battle that leaves [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) unconscious. Leave to find the wyvern's lair.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 44 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-44-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748 - August 8th, 1748             | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 45](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-45-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 45 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-45-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Travel cautiously along [Tokra-Darba Road](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/roads/tokra-darba-road.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, early afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 43)*: Find a dead, disembowled horse on the road. Ambushed by two wyverns during the afternoon rains. Kill them, losing one of the bandits to the poison stinger. Approached by [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>) and her Chardonian companions, seeking to purchase or trade magic items. Meet [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>), [Casian](<../../people/chardonians/casian.md>), [Hektor](<../../people/chardonians/hektor.md>), and [Antonia](<../../people/chardonians/antonia.md>). [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) are magically charmed by [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 43 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-43-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 44)*: Approach the abandoned town of [Vandar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/vandar.md>). Find wyvern's lair amid the ruins. Make camp in a partially intact temple.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 44 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-44-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, night                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 44)*: [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>) attempts to steal the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>), and is caught. [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>) and [Casian](<../../people/chardonians/casian.md>) join the attack. [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>) is knocked unconscious and left for dead; bandits are killed. Fight ends in bitter stalemate. Wellby speaks secretly with [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 44 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-44-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 23th, 1748, night                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 45)*: Flee towards the abandoned mines in the foothills as the ruined town of [Vandar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/vandar.md>) begins to burn in the aftermath of the fight with [Casian](<../../people/chardonians/casian.md>), [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>), and [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>). Camp near the entrance to the old copper mines                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 45 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-45-dufr.md>)                                               |
| July 24th, 1748                                | The [Ring of Displacement Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/ring-of-displacement-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Ring of Displacement Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/ring-of-displacement-vision.md>)                           |

| August 8th, 1748                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 46)*: early evening. Reach [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>). [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) meet [Travok Redpeak](<../../people/dwarves/travok-redpeak.md>), who has news and information for [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>). [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>), [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), and [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) book passage for [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>), to [Nayahar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/western-dunmar/nayahar.md>), and the party, to [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 46 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-46-dufr.md>)                                               |

Have tea with [Roscelia](<../../people/chardonians/roscelia.md>) and [Lyra](<../../people/chardonians/lyra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 49 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-49-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 23th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 49)*: Split up and deal with errands and personal tasks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 49 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-49-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 23th, 1748                              | *(Chronicles of the Silver Tempests Ascendant)*: Arrive at [Suwi](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/suwi.md>), meet village priest, speak with [Clara](<../../people/other-humans/clara.md>) about the Havoc Host.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 4](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-4.md>)           |
| August 23th, 1748                              | *(Chalice of the Runepriest)*: Galen agrees to sell the Chalice of the Runepriest to Riswynn, a dwarf of Nardith                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>)                               |
| August 23th, 1748, late afternoon              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 49)*: Take in [Galen](<../../people/chardonians/galen.md>)'s lecture in the afternoon. Negotiate for the [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>). Meet [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>). Negotiate for [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 49 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-49-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 24th, 1748 - August 29th, 1748          | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 50](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 24th, 1748 - August 25th, 1748          | [Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 1](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-56-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 56 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-56-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 24th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 1)*: Vanish from [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) after using the [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>); appear in [Heart of the Mountain](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/heart-of-the-mountain.md>); speak with the [Bahrazel](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/embodied-gods/bahrazel/bahrazel.md>); rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 56 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-56-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 24th, 1748                              | Given to [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>), in theory in exchange for [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>) and other items                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Pandemonium Scroll](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/pandemonium-scroll.md>)                                             |
| August 24th, 1748                              | *(Chronicles of the Silver Tempests Ascendant)*: Travel upriver to a small lake. Fight slimy minions, find a secret passage, enter flooded caverns. In the caverns, defeat more slime minions and meet the ghost of Milo Kentbrush. Confront Ithu’rax the aboleth, and defeat it, rescuing Dinia.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 4](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-4.md>)           |
| August 24th, 1748                              | *(Chalice of the Runepriest)*: Riswynn purchases the Chalice of the Runepriest for 8000 gold pieces and a minor magic item, a Black Light Candle from [Agata's Treasure](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/hoards/agata-s-treasure.md>). Riswynn attempts to use the chalice to teleport [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) to safety, but is instead transported to the [Heart of the Mountain](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/heart-of-the-mountain.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>)                               |
| August 24th, 1748, morning                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 49)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) goes to purchase the [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>) from Galen. [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) go to [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>)'s tower to make exchange for [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>), giving [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>) the [Pandemonium Scroll](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/pandemonium-scroll.md>) in trade. Walk into an ambush. Flee, nearly dying in the process, with [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>), as [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>) rants about [The Cleansed](<../../groups/the-cleansed.md>). Race through [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) in chaos. [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) vanishes. Escape the city via [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>)'s magic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 49 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-49-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 24th, 1748, afternoon                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: Sneak to a safe place to rest 15 miles east of [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>); sleep. Kenzo dreams of [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 25th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: morning. Wellby buys horses at a small market town; [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) scries. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), and [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) hide in the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>). Wellby rides as fast as possible, passing [Metium](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/metium.md>) and traveling 70 miles east before stopping at midnight to rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 25th, 1748 - November 15th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 25th, 1748                              | *(Chronicles of the Silver Tempests Ascendant)*: Return to [Voltara](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/northern-provinces/voltara/voltara.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 4](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-4.md>)           |
| August 25th, 1748                              | *(Chalice of the Runepriest)*: Riswynn and companions [take the Chalice of the Runepriest into Morkalan](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-56-dufr.md>), where they use it destroy [Hagrim](<../../people/dwarves/hagrim.md>) and the shadowfell domain of [Morkalan](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/morkalan/morkalan.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>)                               |
| August 25th, 1748, morning                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 1)*: Venture into the realm of [Morkalan](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/morkalan/morkalan.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 56 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-56-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 25th, 1748, afternoon                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: Decipher the mystery of [Morkalan](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/morkalan/morkalan.md>) and kill [Hagrim](<../../people/dwarves/hagrim.md>), sending his soul to the gods for judgment.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 26th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) rides 60 miles east. Pass a gray stone monolith about 60 feet high. Sleep.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 26th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: Appear near the [statue of the Stoneborn Warrior](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stoneborn-statue-dungeon.md>) in northern [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>); [Merash](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/merash.md>) and [Rothfis](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/rothfis.md>) return to their lives; [Thror](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/thror.md>) stays to help and seek redemption.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 27th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: Ride 45 miles east before a horse throws a muscle; Wellby gives him away to an apricot farmer. Pass Chardonian legion heading east. Camp just east of [Erlona](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/erlona.md>), about 210 miles east of [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>). Fitful night marred by dreams of a spear-wielding shadow creature.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 27th, 1748 - October 4th, 1748          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Thror](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/thror.md>) and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) guide the freed dwarves of [Morkalan](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/morkalan/morkalan.md>)south to [Nardith](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/nardith.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 28th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: afternoon. [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) hides in the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>) while Kenzo rides east.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 28th, 1748, morning                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: Sell old horses and buy new ones in [Erlona](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/erlona.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 28th, 1748, evening                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: Pass the [Scar of Shadowfire](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/scar-of-shadowfire.md>). Attacked by shadow mastiffs. Two horses and the ladder are frightened by shadows and run, but are relocated after an hour. More nightmares.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 29th, 1748                              | [Shadow Hunter's Mask Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/shadow-hunter-s-mask-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Shadow Hunter's Mask Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/shadow-hunter-s-mask-vision.md>)                           |
| August 29th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: Travel only about 30 miles as the horses are tired after the attack and Kenzo struggles to keep them on pace.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 29th, 1748 - September 6th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 51](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 29th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Use mirror on the mask that falls from the shadow hunter's face: [Shadow Hunter's Mask Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/shadow-hunter-s-mask-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 29th, 1748, evening                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 50)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) takes over, rides another 20 miles by midnight. Camp around 320 miles east of Chardon. Try to rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 50 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-50-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 29th, 1748, late night                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Attacked by a shadow hunter and two yeth hounds around Kill shadow hunter. Manage to sleep.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 30th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Travel east during the day, heading overland away from the [Chasa](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/chasa-nahadi-watershed/chasa.md>). Camp about 20 miles north of Arkad.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 30th, 1748                              | *(Vetta)*: [Urgall the Black](<../../people/skaer/urgall-the-black.md>) and his crew are turned into undead by [Mashtu the Corruptor](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mashtu-the-corruptor.md>) in a ritual of corruption.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Vetta](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/vetta.md>)                                                                       |
| August 30th, 1748                              | *(Blue)*: Blue finds a dead messenger on the road north of [Lake Valandros](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/lake-valandros.md>), with a letter about the [Umbral Covenant](<../../groups/umbral-covenant.md>) addressed to the [Silver Tempests](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/silver-tempests.md>) in [Voltara](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/northern-provinces/voltara/voltara.md>), and decides to deliver the message herself                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>)                                                                         |
| August 31th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Travel through the day.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| August 31th, 1748, night                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Arrive at [Arendum](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/arendum.md>); take rooms at the [Laughing Wolf Inn](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/laughing-wolf-inn.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 1st, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Spend the day in [Arendum](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chasa-river-valley/arendum.md>), asking questions and planting rumors about going north upriver to the [Dwarven Kingdoms](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/dwarven-kingdoms/dwarven-kingdoms.md>).
