Send letters to Chardon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 2nd, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Travel north to the confluence of the [Kayan](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/chasa-nahadi-watershed/kayan.md>) and the [Chasa](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/chasa-nahadi-watershed/chasa.md>). Turn invisible, and head southeast along [the Kayan](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/chasa-nahadi-watershed/kayan.md>). Travel through the day, moving slowly to maintain invisibility with [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>)'s magic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 3rd, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Continue to travel invisibly southeast along the river. Reach the eaves of the Elderwood.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 4th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Travel southeast into the Elderwood. Kenzo's staff begins to pull him east, leading him to a massive tree, called a God Tree by the local [Deno'qai](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/deno-qai.md>). Kenzo meditates and becomes one with the forest. Meet a patrol from the Bek'eni, who escort the party to their village to meet the elf, [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>). Spend the night in the Bek'eni camp, where Delwath is treated like a lord.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 5th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Spend the day at the Bek'eni village. Meet the disgraced Godcaller [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>), who has information about [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>) and the [Te'kula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/te-kula.md>). Spy on [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>)'s house; steal [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>)'s spear and shield. Debate what to do.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 6th, 1748                            | [God Tree Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/god-tree-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [God Tree Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/god-tree-vision.md>)                                                   |
| September 6th, 1748 - September 30th, 1748     | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 52](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 6th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Look at the [Deno'qai](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/deno-qai.md>) God Tree in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [God Tree Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/god-tree-vision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 6th, 1748, morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 51)*: Attempt to leave village. Stopped by the chief, [Zaro](<../../people/deno-qai/zaro.md>), until he is swayed by Seeker's magic. Travel to the God Tree to wait for [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 51 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-51-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 6th, 1748, afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: [Mezzar](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>) arrives. Revealed to be a green dragon in disguise. Combat; party flees into the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 6th, 1748, evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Arrive at clearing where [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) told them to meet her. Rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 7th, 1748 - September 9th, 1748      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Travel through the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>), following [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 7th, 1748, early morning             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) arrives. Discuss situation. Scry [Bek'eni](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/bek-eni.md>), learn they are spreading out to hunt the party. [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) promises to lead them to the Te'kula village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 10th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Arrive in the Te'kula village. Meet [Yota](<../../people/deno-qai/yota.md>), chief of the [Te'kula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/te-kula.md>), and Ayalah, Godcaller of the [Te'kula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/te-kula.md>). [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and Ayalah talk, jades touch, experience vision of [Rai](<../../people/pcs/great-war/rai.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 10th, 1748, morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Travel through the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 10th, 1748, noon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Arrive at outskirts of [Te'kula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/te-kula.md>) land. Pass through dream boundary, see visions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 10th, 1748, evening                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Dinner in the village. Meet [Belegor](<../../people/elves/belegor.md>). [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) prays to [Aaviskar](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/yezali.md>). [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) prays to the [Tanshi](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/tanshi.md>). [Alayah](<../../people/deno-qai/alayah.md>) and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) dream together overnight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 11th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) proposes killing [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>), the dragon. General agreement. War planning at the Te'kula village. Convince Obel, an old hunter whose parents and family were killed by [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>) to join. Get blessings from the [Tanshi](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/tanshi.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 11th, 1748                           | *(Ariel)*: *(Ariel)*: [Meets](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>) [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>), and tells [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) stories of the [Deno'qai](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/deno-qai.md>) and the [Meswati](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/meswati.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Ariel](<../../people/deno-qai/ariel.md>)                                                                       |
| September 11th, 1748                           | *(Belegor)*: . Belegor and the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) meet in the hidden [Te'kula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/elderwood-tribes/te-kula.md>) village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Belegor](<../../people/elves/belegor.md>)                                                                   |
| September 12th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Leave the village for the dragon's lair, guided by [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>) and the [Tanshi](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/tanshi.md>). Travel through the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 12th, 1748                           | *(Dee Wildcloak)*: Dee Wildcloak leaves Chardon quietly, heading for Darba, hoping to escape Fausto's influence                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Dee Wildcloak](<../../people/halflings/dee-wildcloak.md>)                                                       |
| September 13th, 1748 - September 14th, 1748    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Travel through the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>) towards Grimbaskal's lair.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 14th, 1748                           | [Mace of Terror Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mace-of-terror-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Mace of Terror Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mace-of-terror-vision.md>)                                       |
| September 14th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Look at the [Mace of Terror](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mace-of-terror.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Mace of Terror Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mace-of-terror-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 15th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Find [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>)'s lair and the corruption spreading from it. Fight [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>). Defeat [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>). Rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 16th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Organize treasure in Grimbaskal's lair.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 17th, 1748                           | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>) arrives in Voltara with a [letter](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/handouts/letter-from-chardon-for-samso-on-the-umbral-covenant.md>) for [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>) about the [Umbral Covenant](<../../groups/umbral-covenant.md>). The [Silver Tempests](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/silver-tempests.md>), with [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>), transport via plants to [Urkabi](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/urkabi.md>), [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>)'s village, and head downriver on [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>)'s magic raft. Camp along the [Zurrua](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/zurrua.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 17th, 1748, morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Leave Grimbaskal's lair to return to the Te'kula village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 17th, 1748, afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Travel through the forest, now beginning to clear of its evil influences. Find dead [Deno'qai](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/deno-qai.md>) who were once the snake people turned by [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 18th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Travel through the [Elderwood](<../../gazetteer/central-highlands/elderwood.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 18th, 1748                           | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Samso turns the [Silver Tempests](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/silver-tempests.md>) to mist and the party wind walks to [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>), arriving around noon. The group splits up to investigate and gather information, regrouping at [The Laughing Gull](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/the-laughing-gull.md>) that evening to discuss.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 19th, 1748                           | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: The [Silver Tempests](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/silver-tempests.md>) speak to a group of orphans at [The Whale's Spout](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/the-whale-s-spout.md>), then wind walk up the [Kedron](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/kedron.md>) into the interior. Pass a [Drankorian](<../../history/historical-realms/drankorian-empire.md>) mile stone pointing towards the [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>) guard post. Reach a ravine with a fort, and camp for the evening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 20th, 1748 - September 28th, 1748    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Spend time recovering and resting in the Te'kula village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 20th, 1748                           | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Enter the fort, fighting off shadow guardians. Explore Drankorian ruins beyond and find an archive with information about locking the portal to [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>). Continue deeper into the ravine, passing a door with the seal of the wolf-eyed queen, which curses the party preventing sleep. Defeat two warriors of the [Shemra Azem](<../../groups/shemra-azem.md>) in a longhouse beyond. Find the standing stones of the soul compass (forming a light in the shape of the sigil that [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>) has seen) and the [Cleaver-Stone](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/cleaver-stone.md>), which appears to be a portal to somewhere, beyond. Fight Yeshara's lieutenant and more [Shemra Azem](<../../groups/shemra-azem.md>) and nearly die. [Mabist](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/mabist.md>) is knocked unconscious and dragged through the portal; [Adrik](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/adrik.md>) runs through to rescue them, while [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>), in earth elemental form, slays the lieutenant. Use the instructions from the Drankorian archive to lock the portal, seemingly stopping the ongoing incursion. Leave to regroup before entering [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>) to try to find [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>)'s village. | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 20th, 1748, morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Arrive back in the Te'kula village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 21th, 1748 - September 25th, 1748    | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Limp back to [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>), still under the curse of eternal waking from passing the sealed door.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 22th, 1748                           | [Hralgar's Eyes Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/hralgar-s-eyes-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Hralgar's Eyes Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/hralgar-s-eyes-vision.md>)                                       |
| September 22th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Look at [Hralgar's Eyes](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/hralgar-s-eyes.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Hralgar's Eyes Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/hralgar-s-eyes-vision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 26th, 1748 - October 12th, 1748      | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Take rooms at [The Laughing Gull](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/the-laughing-gull.md>), and recover in [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>). Find a priest to remove the curse of eternal waking for a generous donation. Research; meet [Thorek Deepdweller](<../../people/dwarves/thorek-deepdweller.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| September 29th, 1748                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Prepare to leave village with [Theba](<../../people/deno-qai/theba.md>), to help the other tribes heal from the traumas inflicted by [Grimbaskal](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mezzar.md>) over the past twenty years or more. The [elf](<../../creatures/species/elves.md>), [Belegor](<../../people/elves/belegor.md>), agrees to come. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) gets the second piece of jade from [Alayah](<../../people/deno-qai/alayah.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
