| September 30th, 1748 - October 12th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 1 (Prequel)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-60-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 60 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-60-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 30th, 1748                           | *(Elazar)*: . Elazar met [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) when [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) appeared in [Orekatu](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/orekatu.md>). Taught [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) the lizardfolk language and introduced him to lizardfolk spiritual practices over the next month.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Elazar](<../../people/lizardfolk/elazar.md>)                                                                     |
| September 30th, 1748, morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 52)*: Leave village, collapsing pocket dimension in the process as the [Jade Piece of Rai's Hand](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>) holding it open is removed. As the pocket dimension collapses, the party is scattered in all directions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 52 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-52-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 30th, 1748, afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Arrive in northern forests. Meet hunting party of Deno'qai of the [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) tribe. Spend the night in their camp.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 30th, 1748, afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Arrive in the jungles far to the east; meet [Elazar](<../../people/lizardfolk/elazar.md>); travel to lizardfolk village of [Bedez](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/bedez.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 57 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-57-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 30th, 1748, afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Seeker Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) arrives in the [Feywild](<../../cosmology/feywild.md>) realm of Fortune’s Rest                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 61 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-61-dufr.md>)                                               |
| September 30th, 1748, afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Land on the [Wave Dancer](<../../things/ships/wave-dancer.md>), which is in the midst of fleeing hobgoblin pirates. Help halflings escape in the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 60 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-60-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 1st, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Leave camp, travel with a guide named [Zevi](<../../people/deno-qai/zevi-of-the-ko-zula.md>) back to the main village of the [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 1st, 1748 - October 25th, 1748         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Spend time with [Elazar](<../../people/lizardfolk/elazar.md>) in the village, learning the language and about the spirit realms                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 57 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-57-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 1st, 1748 - October 11th, 1748         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Sail east across the [Green Sea](<../../gazetteer/green-sea.md>) on the halfling trader [Wave Dancer](<../../things/ships/wave-dancer.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 60 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-60-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 2nd, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Travel through the forest with [Zevi](<../../people/deno-qai/zevi-of-the-ko-zula.md>), arrive in village, meet the village leader [Ninu](<../../people/deno-qai/ninu.md>), learn story of the [Meswati](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/meswati.md>), the silent tanshi                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 3rd, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Spend the day in the village                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 3rd, 1748 - October 12th, 1748         | [Dunmari Frontier - Seeker Solo Session 2](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-63-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 63 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-63-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 4th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Spend the day in the village                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 5th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Leave for hunting camp near the [Forest of Nightmares](<../../gazetteer/northern-sentinels/forest-of-nightmares.md>), travel                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 53 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-53-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 5th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and freed dwarves arrive in [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 5th, 1748                              | *(Chalice of the Runepriest)*: The Chalice of the Runepriest is returned to its rightful place in [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Chalice of the Runepriest](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/chalice-of-the-runepriest.md>)                               |
| October 6th, 1748 - October 9th, 1748          | [Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 2](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 54 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 2)*: Arrive at the hunting camp, meet [Aristaea](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/aristaea.md>) Mountainhands and [Iascaire](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/iascaire.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 54 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Walk all day and night back into the [Forest of Nightmares](<../../gazetteer/northern-sentinels/forest-of-nightmares.md>), towards the site of the Battle of Endless Dark                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Travel back to [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) village. Rest in the woods on the way.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Arrive back at the [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) village; celebrate. Part ways with [Iascaire](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/iascaire.md>) and [Aristaea](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/aristaea.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748 - October 11th, 1748         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) rests in [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>) and gathers news                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748, midday                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Arrive at the site of the Battle of Endless Dark. Meet the ghost of a betrayed giant, slain by Deno'qai. Learn that the tanshi and a hobgoblin army are trapped through a portal to a shadow realm. Kill [Hobgoblins](<../../creatures/species/hobgoblins.md>) guarding the portal on the shadow side. Rest, and return to banish the tanshi [Taraka](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/taraka.md>) from the shadow realm back to their home plane. Flee, closing the portal with the [Hobgoblins](<../../creatures/species/hobgoblins.md>) trapped inside.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748, midday                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Arrive at the battlefield on the banks of the [Yemo'te](<../../gazetteer/northern-sentinels/yemo-te.md>). Fight cursed undead hobgoblin wizard and skeletal minions. Destroy armband, freeing the tanshi [Midri](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/midri.md>) and [K'onisati](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/k-onisati.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 6th, 1748, afternoon                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Rest briefly, then leave for the site of the Battle of the [Yemo'te](<../../gazetteer/northern-sentinels/yemo-te.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 7th, 1748                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 2)*: Set off with [Aristaea](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/aristaea.md>) and [Iascaire](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/iascaire.md>) for the [Forest of Nightmares](<../../gazetteer/northern-sentinels/forest-of-nightmares.md>). Arrive at the battlefield of the Battle without Hope. Fight haunted spirits, uncover the location of a shadow armband, destroy it, freeing [Yalik'i](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/yalik-i.md>) and [Nisir](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/nisir.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 54 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 7th, 1748, late afternoon              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 2)*: Depart battlefield of the Battle without Hope. Walk through the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 54 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 8th, 1748, mid-morning                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 2)*: Arrive at the site of the Battle of Darkfire. Remove the armband from the dead body of a massive demon while fighting demonic beasts and trees. Destroy armband, freeing [Yezali](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/yezali.md>). Head back to safety of [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) land to rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 54 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-54-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 9th, 1748 - October 14th, 1748         | [Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 9th, 1748, afternoon                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Delwath Solo Session 3)*: Arrive in [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) land. Rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 55 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-55-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 12th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) departs for [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 12th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: Arrive at the port of [Wahacha](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/wahacha.md>) in the Vermillion Archipelago, the islands of the kenku. Speak with [Makha](<../../people/kenku/makha.md>), learn about raiders and missing people; learn that two recently kidnapped kenku named [Skoda](<../../people/kenku/skoda.md>) and [Nahto](<../../people/kenku/nahto.md>) could point you towards someone who could help you get back to your friends. Spend the night in [Wahacha](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/wahacha.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 60 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-60-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 13th, 1748 - October 25th, 1748        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) travels across [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) towards [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 13th, 1748 - October 14th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 2](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-62-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 62 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-62-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 13th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 2)*: Meet [Artem](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/artem-novolozek.md>), [Alimash](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/alimash.md>), [Rufus](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/rufus.md>), and [Shoal](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/shoal.md>) at the Dolphin’s Rest, and learn they are all seeking the lair of the raiders. Join forces; sail out to sea.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 62 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-62-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 13th, 1748 - November 13th, 1748       | [Dunmari Frontier - Seeker Solo Session 3](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-65-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 65 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-65-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 13th, 1748                             | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Gather at [The Sober Seal](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/the-sober-seal.md>) in the evening, to discuss plans.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| October 14th, 1748 - November 15th, 1748       | [Interlude: Delwath's Journey South](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| October 14th, 1748 - October 21th, 1748        | *(Interlude: Delwath's Journey South)*: Rest, gather information, celebrate, and commune with the [Meswati](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/tanshi/meswati/meswati.md>) at the [Ko'zula](<../../groups/cultures/deno-qai-tribes/northern-tribes/ko-zula.md>) village.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| October 14th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 2)*: Arrive at lair; fight possessed sharks and enslaved sailors; find and kill aboleth.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 62 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-62-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 14th, 1748 - November 13th, 1748       | [Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 14th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3)*: Rescue prisoners from aboleth lair, leave for [Wahacha](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/wahacha.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 14th, 1748                             | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Plane Shift to [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>), arriving on a foggy hill near the palace. Find palace. Lure guards from the gates, kill them. Meet Yeshara and discover some human prisoners; kill minions but run away from an unwinnable fight against Yeshara. Follow road to Eshlem, meet a few villagers. Talk to Joram of Eshlem, an old war veteran who speaks Goblin, and learn of the Stillings where sleep is kept contained. Return to Sarren Kir, with wolves hunting them. Find old barrows with dead dwarf dreamers from the [War of the Dark Rift](<../1500s/war-of-the-dark-rift.md>), and defeat undead; [Adrik](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/adrik.md>) finds a portal to [Enderra](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/enderra.md>). Find lizardfolk dreamers. Fight [Shemra Azem](<../../groups/shemra-azem.md>) guards, bring _Daylight_ to barrows awakening sleepers and destroying [Shemra Azem](<../../groups/shemra-azem.md>). Fight and defeat Yeshara. Fall into sleep as Yeshara falls.                                                                                                                                                      | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| October 15th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3)*: Arrive back in [Wahacha](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/wahacha.md>). Help freed victims get organized to travel to the sea [elves](<../../creatures/species/elves.md>) until a cure can be found. Say farewell to [Artem](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/artem-novolozek.md>) who departs for [Medju](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/medju.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |
| October 15th, 1748 - June 27th, 1752           | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>), [Adrik](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/adrik.md>), and [Mabist](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/mabist.md>) sleep, along with the lizardfolk dreamers and all the inhabitants of [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>), as Yeshara's dreamless slumber puts the realm into stasis. [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>), transformed to an Earth Elemental, is unaffected by sleep and wanders the realm for years, eventually deciding to sleep with his companions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| October 16th, 1748 - October 22th, 1748        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3)*: Organize a ship and supplies from [Wahacha](<../../gazetteer/eastern-green-sea/wahacha.md>), to sail north.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |

| October 24th, 1748 - November 12th, 1748       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3)*: Sail north, passing many strange islands along the way.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |

| October 26th, 1748 - October 28th, 1748        | *(Interlude: Delwath's Journey South)*: Ride out of the mountains, past the growing storm around [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| October 26th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 1 (Prequel))*: [Elazar](<../../people/lizardfolk/elazar.md>) guides Kenku on a [spirit journey](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/dreams-and-visions/kenzo-spirit-journey-in-bedez.md>) through the [Dreamworld](<../../cosmology/dreamworld.md>); [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) learns of different kinds of ki, and seeks the soul of [Apollyon](<../../people/historical-figures/drankorian-emperors/apollyon.md>), among other journeys                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 57 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-57-dufr.md>)                                               |

| November 2nd, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 2)*: Heroes of [Orekatu](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/orekatu.md>) gather in [Bedez](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/bedez.md>) to choose who will travel to the [Footprint of the Gods](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/azta-lekua.md>) and seek answers to the chaotic energy and imbalance there                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 59 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-59-dufr.md>)                                               |

| November 4th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 2)*: [Enari](<../../people/lizardfolk/enari.md>), [Izzarak](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/izzarak.md>), and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) leave [Bedez](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/bedez.md>), heading for the [Footprint of the Gods](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/azta-lekua.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 59 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-59-dufr.md>)                                               |

| November 6th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 2)*: Arrive footprint of gods; encounter a lava river and the fire spirit [Somi-nai](<../../people/fey/somi-nai.md>) being chased by corrupted dinosaurs of elemental fire; destroy flame dinosaurs.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 59 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-59-dufr.md>)                                               |

| November 6th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 3)*: Speak with [Somi-nai](<../../people/fey/somi-nai.md>). Cross the lava river, and proceed to the flooded jungle. Commune with an ancient tree; find the dryad [Eleuha](<../../people/fey/eleuha.md>); avoid a maelstrom whirlpool dragging everything it touches into an endless watery void; confront [Motua](<../../people/other-nonhumans/motua.md>) and heal their wounds, freeing them of the bindings that weakened and sickened them; meet [Lengau](<../../people/other-nonhumans/lengau.md>), the jaguar spirit guardian of the jungle.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 64 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-64-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 6th, 1748                             | *(Motua)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), [Izzarak](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/izzarak.md>), and [Enari](<../../people/lizardfolk/enari.md>) heal [Motua](<../../people/other-nonhumans/motua.md>).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Motua](<../../people/other-nonhumans/motua.md>)                                                                       |
| November 7th, 1748 - November 12th, 1748       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 3)*: Spend time in the jungle with [Motua](<../../people/other-nonhumans/motua.md>) and [Lengau](<../../people/other-nonhumans/lengau.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 64 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-64-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 11th, 1748 - November 15th, 1748      | *(Interlude: Delwath's Journey South)*: Wait in camp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| November 13th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Kenzo Solo Session 3)*: [Izzarak](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/izzarak.md>) decides to remain and care for the babies, whatever they will become; [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) plane-shifted to the [Feywild](<../../cosmology/feywild.md>), to [Lastlight Falls](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/lastlight-falls.md>), by the magic of [Lengau](<../../people/other-nonhumans/lengau.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 64 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-64-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 13th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Wellby Solo Session 3)*: Arrive [Arryn](<../../people/other-humans/arryn.md>)'s tower. Fight mirror shards, meet [Gyles](<../../people/other-humans/gyles.md>) the steward, discover that [Arryn](<../../people/other-humans/arryn.md>) is trapped in the [Mirror Realm](<../../cosmology/demiplanes-and-echo-realms/mirror-realm.md>). Free [Arryn](<../../people/other-humans/arryn.md>). Say goodbye to [Shoal](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/shoal.md>), who heads south again to court his lady love, and [Alimash](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/guests/alimash.md>), who remains in [Arryn](<../../people/other-humans/arryn.md>)’s service for the time being.
