[Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) is plane shifted to [Lastlight Falls](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/lastlight-falls.md>), the fey crossing near [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>) in the north of [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>), by [Arryn](<../../people/other-humans/arryn.md>)’s magic.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 66 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-66-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 13th, 1748 - November 15th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 67](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-67-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 67 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-67-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 13th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 67)*: on the material plane; **Evening, in the feywild**: Raven and Spirala depart to return to [Shimmersong](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/shimmersong.md>). Seeker is reunited with Wellby and Kenzo, who are introduced to Caulaus.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 67 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-67-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 14th, 1748                            | *(Interlude: Delwath's Journey South)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) arrives                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| November 14th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Riswynn Solo Session 2)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) are reunited on the arid plains of the [Nashtkar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/nashtkar.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 58 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-58-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 14th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 67)*: on the material plane; **Evening in the Feywild**: The group leaves for Heartwood Grove to restore Typhinia. Encounter harpies, and meet a water nymph. At the Heartwood Grove, Seeker restores Typhinia, only to find that she is actually [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>) Dustmother in disguise. Defeat [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>); imprison her in the Heartwood Grove. Caulaus volunteers to stay as a guardian until he can make amends to the [Cloudspinner](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/cloudspinner.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 67 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-67-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748                            | [Cha'mutte's Armband Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/cha-mutte-armband-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Cha'mutte Armband Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/cha-mutte-armband-vision.md>)                                 |
| November 15th, 1748                            | *(Interlude: Delwath's Journey South)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) is reuinted                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Interlude (Delwath Postscript)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-delwath-postscript.md>)                     |
| November 15th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 67)*: sunset: Exit the Feywild at [Lastlight Falls](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/lastlight-falls.md>); see Delwath and Riswynn.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 67 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-67-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748                            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 68](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-68-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 68 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-68-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 68)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) exit the [Feywild](<../../cosmology/feywild.md>) at sunset, and are reunited with [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 68 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-68-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748 - November 23th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 69](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: A vision of [Cha'mutte’s Shadow Armband](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/cha-muttes-shadow-armband.md>) is seen in [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>): [Cha'mutte Armband Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/cha-mutte-armband-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 15th, 1748, evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) talk and catch up.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 16th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) is uncursed by [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), sacrificing his [Horn of Silent Alarm](<../../things/magic-items/horn-of-silent-alarm-dunmari.md>) in the process; [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) speaks with [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>) via sending. Party travels west towards [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 17th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Travel west; speak with [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>) via Sending; scry on [Hektor](<../../people/chardonians/hektor.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 18th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Travel west; learn [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>) is meeting with Samraat [Nayan Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>); detour around some ogres.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 19th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Arrive south of [Raven's Hold](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/raven-s-hold.md>). Scout, discover it is quiet; camp early.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 20th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>)'s prayers are answered and [Havdar](<../../people/dunmari/havdar.md>)'s cursed sword is destroyed by the Baharazel, freeing him of its influence. Send a message with sending to apologize. Travel west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 20th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Riswynn's prayers are granted by the Bahrazel, freeing Havdar from his cursed sword. (recharge:: "divine inspiration")                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 21th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Travel west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 22th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Travel west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748, mid-afternoon             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 69)*: Arrive at [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>), spend time planning and scouting with spells.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 69 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-69-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748                            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 70](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-70-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 70 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-70-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748                            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 71](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-71-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 71 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-71-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748 - November 24th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 72](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-72-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 72 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-72-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748, late afternoon            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 70)*: Enter the storm around [Stormcaller Tower](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/stormcaller-tower.md>), chasing a possessed [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>). Dodge animated storm elementals protecting the approach. Reach [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>)'s dreamscape, bring [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>) back to himself with stories.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 70 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-70-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748, evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 71)*: Fight Hraglar's storm-crazed ghost duplicate. Free Hraglar from his chains, watch as he destroys the tower and the statue of his bust. Sit with [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>) for the evening, talking.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 71 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-71-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 23th, 1748, night                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 72)*: Listen to Hralgar's stories into the night                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 72 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-72-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748                            | [Enchiridion of the Occulta Ludum Viision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/enchiridion-of-the-occulta-ludum-viision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Enchiridion of the Occulta Ludum Viision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/enchiridion-of-the-occulta-ludum-viision.md>) |
| November 24th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 72)*: The party says goodbye to [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>) and receives his wind blessing, allowing them to travel quickly as clouds to his ruined palace in the mountains. Scout, and find dark shadows boiling out of the basement, and a icy structure on the main floor. Parlay with an ice maiden, until she brags of freezing travelers on the passes and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) shoots. Defeat her ice maiden form, and then crush her heart of ice and crystal, destroying her.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 72 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-72-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 72)*: [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>) used to look at the Enchiridion of the [Occulta Ludum](<../../groups/drankorian-societies/occulta-ludum.md>), seeing the [Enchiridion of the Occulta Ludum Viision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/enchiridion-of-the-occulta-ludum-viision.md>). recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 72 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-72-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748                            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 73](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-73-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 73 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-73-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748 - November 29th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 74](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748, afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 73)*: Venture to the library, and find their way to the [Dreamworld](<../../cosmology/dreamworld.md>), where they encounter the tricks of [Kurome](<../../people/other-nonhumans/kurome.md>). Recover the phasing stone, returning to a dream version of the real world. Wake themselves up before freezing to death. Record information from [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>)'s library about skyships. Depart to return to the crash of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) at dusk, with [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>)'s wind blessing.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 73 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-73-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 24th, 1748, evening                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Return to the crash of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) by evening with [Hralgar](<../../people/giants/hralgar.md>)'s wind blessing.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 25th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Work on skyship. Convert [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>)'s shield to an [adamantine](<../../things/materials/adamantine.md>) harness to hold phasing stone.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 26th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Work on skyship, finishing the stone helm on which the phasing stone will be mounted; scry on [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>), [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 27th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Work on skyship, converting gold and silver to wire to construct the channeling device. Meet [Alesh](<../../people/dunmari/alesh.md>); speak with her about events in [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) and give her letter and sending stone for [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>). Sending with Ulfgar and [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>), who both agree to do research.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 27th, 1748 - January 20th, 1749       | The [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| November 27th, 1748                            | *(War of the Cloak)*: Grash departs Kharsan with an army of orcs and undead                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| November 28th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Continue to work on the channeling device; scry [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>) and see army leaving. [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) dreams of shadow hunter threatening that he is coming.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 29th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 74)*: Finish work on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>). [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) attunes to the phasing stone, and begins to practice flying. Shadow dogs attack at midnight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 74 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-74-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 29th, 1748 - December 4th, 1748       | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 75](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 29th, 1748, midnight                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: Shadow hunters attack at midnight. Defeated, but not before the shadow assassin knocked [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) unconscious and attempts to flee with him.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| November 30th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) spends the day learning to control and fly [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), while the rest of the party prepares for the journey east.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 1st, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) attunes to the phasing stone and spends the day learning to control and fly [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>); speak with [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) via Sending Stone                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 2nd, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) asks the Baharazel about their chosen course of action; [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>)'s lynx spirit leaves to take letters to Lakan monks; take off flying east, with [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) alternating piloting; fly 22 hours                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 3rd, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: Continue flying east, [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) alternating over 22 hours                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 4th, 1748 - December 5th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 76](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-76-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 76 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-76-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 4th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 76)*: Overfly kingdom of [Xurkhaz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/xurkhaz.md>), scouting. Speak with [Vorgaz](<../../people/orcs/vorgaz.md>), commander of a fort on the western border, then fly through the night to [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>), the capital. Scry on [Govir](<../../people/dunmari/govir.md>) and Ulfgar to gather their research on the way.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 76 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-76-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 4th, 1748, dawn                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 75)*: See the edge of the [orcs](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) territory from the air, maybe 40-50 miles distant, in the early morning light.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 75 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-75-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 5th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 76)*: Arrive at [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>) early in the morning. Land, leaving [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) in charge of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>). Wait for hours for an audience with the Chief. Speak with Chief [Lubash](<../../people/orcs/lubash.md>) and his advisors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 76 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-76-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 5th, 1748 - December 6th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 77](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-77-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 77 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-77-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 5th, 1748                             | *(War of the Cloak)*: Grash arrives on the outskirts of [Xurkhaz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/xurkhaz.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 5th, 1748, afternoon                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 77)*: Give General [Murook](<../../people/orcs/murook.md>) and Loremaster [Azogar](<../../people/orcs/azogar.md>) tour of skyship. Dinner and conversation with [Lubash](<../../people/orcs/lubash.md>). Plan for possible attack from [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>) and company.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 77 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-77-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 6th, 1748 - December 8th, 1748        | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 78](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-78-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 78 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-78-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 6th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 78)*: Spend the day in [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>), trying to play-act a fight with Chief [Lubash](<../../people/orcs/lubash.md>); depart in fake disgrace; sneak back into palace under cover of darkness to wait. No attack comes during the fitful night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 78 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-78-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 6th, 1748                             | *(War of the Cloak)*: [Khumarz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/khumarz.md>) is attacked after nightfall by Grash's army. The orc garrison at [Khumarz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/khumarz.md>) manages to repel Grash's forces, keeping them from crossing the [Kulthul](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/istaros-watershed/kulthul.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
