| December 7th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 78)*: Pass the day hidden at the palace, waiting.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 78 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-78-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 8th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 78)*: [Kadmos](<../../people/chardonians/kadmos.md>) and company attack in the early morning hours, well before dawn, and are defeated.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 78 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-78-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 8th, 1748 - December 10th, 1748       | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 79](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-79-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 79 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-79-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 8th, 1748                             | *(War of the Cloak)*: A small company of elite adventurers attacks [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>) in the early morning hours, hoping to acquire the [Cloak of Rainbows](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/cloak-of-rainbows.md>) and vanish. They are defeated and killed or captured by [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 9th, 1748                             | [Mantle of Protection Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mantle-of-protection-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Mantle of Protection Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mantle-of-protection-vision.md>)                           |
| December 9th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 79)*: The prisoners are interrogated and plans are made.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 79 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-79-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 9th, 1748                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 79)*: Eudomes Mirror used to look at the [Cloak of Rainbows](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/cloak-of-rainbows.md>): [Mantle of Protection Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/mantle-of-protection-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 79 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-79-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 10th, 1748 - December 17th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 80](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 10th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Leave [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>), flying north on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 10th, 1748, morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 79)*: [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>), and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) leave for the north to destroy the [Scepter of Command](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/scepter-of-command.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 79 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-79-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 11th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Fly north, high over the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 11th, 1748                            | *(War of the Cloak)*: Battle of the Kulthul. The orc army is overrun at [Khumarz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/khumarz.md>), and Grash's forces cross the Kulthul into [Xurkhaz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/xurkhaz.md>). Grash's army now consists entirely of undead.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 11th, 1748                            | *(Khumarz)*: Khumarz is destroyed by [Grash's army of undead](<../../groups/orc-hordes/grash-s-horde.md>) in  Battle of the Kulthul during the [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Khumarz](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/khumarz.md>)                                                                   |
| December 12th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Fly over [Isingue](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/isingue.md>); descend to investigate, attacked by some kind of acidic ooze                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 13th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Reach [Mostreve Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/mostreve-hills.md>); fly over [Tyrwingha](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tyrwingha/tyrwingha.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 14th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Reach [Western Gulf](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/western-gulf.md>); [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) communes with the ocean life                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 14th, 1748                            | The [Battle of Tokra](<1748/12/battle-of-tokra.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Battle of Tokra](<1748/12/battle-of-tokra.md>)                                                   |
| December 14th, 1748                            | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The [Battle of Tokra](<1748/12/battle-of-tokra.md>) marks the first combat between Chardonian and Dunmari forces.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| December 14th, 1748                            | *(The Siblings War)*: The [Battle of Tokra](<1748/12/battle-of-tokra.md>). Sura's armies defeat the Karnas and his Chardonian allies outside of Tokra, and drive Karnas's troops south, towards Darba.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Sibling War](<sibling-war.md>)                                                           |
| December 15th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Fly across [Western Gulf](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/western-gulf.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 15th, 1748                            | *(War of the Cloak)*: Grash's army reaches [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 16th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Arrive in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>); split up and speak with various people; spend the night at *[The Windward Sail](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/places/the-windward-sail.md>)*                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 16th, 1748                            | *(War of the Cloak)*: Grash's armies attempt to overrun [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>), and fail, thanks to the protection of [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) and the [Bahrazel](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/embodied-gods/bahrazel/bahrazel.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 17th, 1748 - December 25th, 1748      | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 81](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 17th, 1748                            | *(War of the Cloak)*: The Siege of Uzgukhar begins                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| December 17th, 1748, morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 80)*: Speak with [Melindir](<../../people/elves/melindir.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 80 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-80-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 17th, 1748, afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: Meet [Iskra](<../../people/skaer/iskra.md>) at the Temple of [Kaikkea](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/kaikkea.md>). Meet Nika at [The Windward Sail](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/places/the-windward-sail.md>), who takes party to [Umli](<../../people/other-nonhumans/umli.md>) and then [Caelynn](<../../people/fey/caelynn.md>). Speak with [Umli](<../../people/other-nonhumans/umli.md>); speak with [Caelynn](<../../people/fey/caelynn.md>). [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) returns to speak with [Iskra](<../../people/skaer/iskra.md>) for the afternoon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 18th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) gets a tattoo and collects Cecilia's story. [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) purchases furniture. Party leaves north on the skyship.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 19th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: Fly north and east towards [Skaer Islands](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/skaerhem.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 20th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: Fly north and east towards [Skaer Islands](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/skaerhem.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 20th, 1748                            | *(The Siblings War)*: Hostilities cease to celebrate the holy month of Pralakar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Sibling War](<sibling-war.md>)                                                           |
| December 21th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: Meet [Skalme](<../../people/skaer/skalme.md>) on [Antaka](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/antaka.md>), learn about how to destroy the [Scepter of Command](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/scepter-of-command.md>). Arrive at [Pyhlla](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/skaerhem/pyhlla.md>), talk to [Vaallinen](<../../people/skaer/vaallinen.md>), learn about [Urgall the Black](<../../people/skaer/urgall-the-black.md>). Talk to [Tulvak](<../../people/skaer/tulvak.md>) about the raid.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |
| December 22th, 1748                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 81)*: Blessed by [Kaikkea](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/kaikkea.md>) at dawn. Fly to island. Scout, find lava tube. Enter under the temple complex. Surprise [Urgall](<../../people/skaer/urgall-the-black.md>) and kill him. Attack [demonic entity](<../../people/other-nonhumans/mashtu-the-corruptor.md>) corrupting the waters, kill it. Rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 81 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-81-dufr.md>)                                               |

| January 18th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 88)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) flies over the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>) as the party races towards Uzguhkhar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 88 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-88-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 19th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 88)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) flies over the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>) as the party races towards Uzguhkhar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 88 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-88-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 19th, 1749                             | *(War of the Cloak)*: Bonecrusher is ready, and is slowly brought forward to pummel the city                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| January 20th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 88)*: The party arrives in [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>) soon after sunrise. [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) rejoins the group. Together, they destroy a massive trebuchet, fight off specters, and kill [Grash](<../../people/other-nonhumans/grash.md>) in the [Battle for Uzgukhar](<1749/battle-for-uzgukhar.md>). [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) is killed, and resurrected. The people of [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>) celebrate survival.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 88 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-88-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 20th, 1749 - January 30th, 1749        | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 89](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 20th, 1749                             | The [Battle for Uzgukhar](<1749/battle-for-uzgukhar.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Battle for Uzgukhar](<1749/battle-for-uzgukhar.md>)                                           |
| January 20th, 1749                             | *(War of the Cloak)*: Bombardment of Uzgukhar begins at dawn. The [Battle for Uzgukhar](<1749/battle-for-uzgukhar.md>). Grash is defeated, and the war ends.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [War of the Cloak](<war-of-the-cloak.md>)                                                 |
| January 21th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Rest in [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 22th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Rest in [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 23th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Rest in [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>). [Festival of the New Dawn](<../../gods-and-religions/holidays-and-festivals/dunmari-festivals/festival-of-the-new-dawn.md>), marking first day of the Dunmari new year, the 192nd year of the [Nayan Dynasty](<../../groups/dunmari-dynasties/nayan-dynasty.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 24th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Meet [Nuzkar](<../../people/orcs/nuzkar.md>) and [Aygul](<../../people/orcs/aygul.md>), [orc](<../../creatures/species/orcs.md>) sisters who join the crew of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>). Depart west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 25th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Travel west across the [Garamjala](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/garamjala-desert.md>), passing over [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>). Stop and explore.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 26th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Burn Grash's orc warren in a holy ritual, freeing souls of the plague dead who died on this spot. Turn west in the afternoon, departing [Kharsan](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/kharsan.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 26th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: The past of the Longsword of Heroism revealed in the [Broken Dunmari Sword Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/broken-dunmari-sword-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 27th, 1749                             | The [Broken Dunmari Sword Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/broken-dunmari-sword-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Broken Dunmari Sword Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/broken-dunmari-sword-vision.md>)                           |
| January 27th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Travel west across the [Nashtkar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/nashtkar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 28th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Arrive at [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>). Meet [Kethra](<../../people/dwarves/kethra.md>), a [dwarven](<../../creatures/species/dwarves.md>) smith who has sought out [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) to be her mentor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 29th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: Stay with [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>), [Avaras](<../../people/dunmari/avaras.md>), and [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 30th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 89)*: (morning) Discuss the situation in [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) with [Pava](<../../people/dunmari/pava.md>) and consider whether to intervene somehow.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 89 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-89-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 30th, 1749 - March 9th, 1749           | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 90](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 30th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: (late morning) depart west for the [Copper Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/darba-highlands/copper-hills.md>) on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), passing south of [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>) and the [Red Mesa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/red-mesa.md>) in the night                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| January 31th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Watch the sun rise over the  [~Southern Tokra Plains~](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/southern-tokra-plains.md>); travel across the plains during the day, and reach and cross the [Hara](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/rivers/hara-watershed/hara.md>) river in the evening. Continue west through the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| February 1st, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Reach the outskirts of the [Copper Hills](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/darba-highlands/copper-hills.md>) in the morning. Speak with [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), then [Johar](<../../people/dunmari/johar.md>). Send messages to the [Sonkar Mystai](<../../groups/dunmari-mystery-cults/sonkar-mystai.md>) [Abha](<../../people/dunmari/abha.md>). Meditate with [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) in the evening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| February 1st, 1749 - February 3rd, 1749        | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) leads [negotiations between Sura and Karnas](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |

| February 2nd, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Meet with [Abha](<../../people/dunmari/abha.md>). Meet with [Nayan Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>) and use the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>) to reveal [Agata](<../../people/fey/agata.md>)'s meddling. Speak with [Abha](<../../people/dunmari/abha.md>) again. Return to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |

| February 3rd, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Tie up loose ends in Sura's camp.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
