Travel to [Orenlas](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/orenlas.md>), crossing the [~North Tokra Plains~](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/north-tokra-plains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |

| February 7th, 1749                             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Travel towards [Orenlas](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/orenlas.md>), crossing over the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |

| February 17th, 1749                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: The history of magical pale blue dye from [Ursk](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/ursk.md>) is revealed in [Magical Pale Blue Dye Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/magical-pale-blue-dye-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |

| March 1st, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: The history of a white dragon tooth from [Ursk](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/ursk.md>) is revealed in [Cecilia's White Dragon Tooth Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/cecilia-s-white-dragon-tooth-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 9th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 90)*: Meet the [kenku](<../../creatures/species/kenku.md>) scout [Kecha](<../../people/kenku/kecha.md>) on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>). Shadow hunter attack well after midnight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 90 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-90-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 9th, 1749 - March 18th, 1749             | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 91](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 9th, 1749, late night                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Defeat shadow hunters attacking [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 10th, 1749 - March 12th, 1749            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Gather supplies and prepare for the journey north.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 13th, 1749, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Depart [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>), heading northeast across [Vostok](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/vostok/vostok.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 14th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Fly across [Vostok](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/vostok/vostok.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 15th, 1749, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Reach [Svinjo Mountains](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/svinjo-mountains.md>) amid gathering clouds and a threatened storm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 16th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Wait out snowstorm on the ground                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 17th, 1749, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Cross [Svinjo Mountains](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/svinjo-mountains.md>) mountains                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 17th, 1749, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: See frost giants watching over dwarven miners. Speak to giants, and dwarves. Learn about [Brimskarda](<../../people/giants/brimskarda.md>), King of the Frost Giants. Send lynx messenger with letter of introduction ahead. Travel to [Brimskarda](<../../people/giants/brimskarda.md>)'s steading, [Isenborg](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/isenborg.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 18th, 1749 - March 21th, 1749            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 92](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 18th, 1749, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: Arrive at [Brimskarda](<../../people/giants/brimskarda.md>)'s steading                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 18th, 1749, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Meet [Brimskarda](<../../people/giants/brimskarda.md>), speak about dragons and giants. Feast with [Brimskarda](<../../people/giants/brimskarda.md>)'s court at [Isenborg](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/isenborg.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 19th, 1749, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Meet [Algerd](<../../people/giants/algerd.md>), recruit him to journey east. Leave [Isenborg](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/isenborg.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 19th, 1749, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Reach the [Ket](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/ket.md>), follow the frozen river east.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 20th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Travel east along the [Ket](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/ket.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 21th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Fight and defeat an ice worm, rescuing two [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 21th, 1749                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 93](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-93-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 93 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-93-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 21th, 1749, early afternoon              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 92)*: Reach [Vargald](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) camp south of the [Ket](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/ket.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 92 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-92-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 21th, 1749, late afternoon               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 93)*: Speak with [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>). Meet [Jotha](<../../people/deno-qai/jotha.md>), Torsten, Zora, and others in the village. Learn of danger of a nearby dragon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 93 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-93-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 21th, 1749, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 93)*: Hide [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) in [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>); confront and defeat dragon. Rest and plan.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 93 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-93-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 22th, 1749 - April 15th, 1749            | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 94](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 22th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: The party settles into the [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) camp to learn Urskan and gather information over the next couple of weeks; the one year anniversary of when [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>), [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>), and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) met in [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 23th, 1749 - March 25th, 1749            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Downtime in the [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) camp                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 26th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: The [Festival of Rebirth](<../../gods-and-religions/holidays-and-festivals/dunmari-festivals/festival-of-rebirth.md>) is celebrated in [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>), and quietly marked by the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) in the far north                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 27th, 1749                               | The [Phasing Stone Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/phasing-stone-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Phasing Stone Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/phasing-stone-vision.md>)                                         |
| March 27th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 91)*: [Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/phasing-stone-vision.md>) of the [Phasing Stone](<../../things/magic-items/phasing-stones.md>) is revealed in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 91 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-91-dufr.md>)                                               |
| March 27th, 1749 - April 7th, 1749             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Downtime in the [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) camp, learning passable Urskan and gathering information and rumors.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 8th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Depart the [Vargaldi](<../../groups/cultures/vargaldi.md>) camp, heading east along the [Ket](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/ket.md>) in [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 9th, 1749 - April 10th, 1749             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Continue traveling east                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 11th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Bid farewell to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), leaving [Faldrak](<../../people/dwarves/faldrak-bronzehammer.md>) in command, and use the rainbow bridge to teleport to within 30 miles of the city of [Zvervinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/zvervinka.md>). Trek east throughout the day.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 12th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Trek through snow and mud east, following the [Ket](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/ket.md>), camping a few miles from the city at dusk.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 13th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Enter [Zvervinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/zvervinka.md>), after speaking with the guard, [Fyodar](<../../people/other-humans/fyodar.md>). Meet [Roman](<../../people/other-humans/roman.md>), the proprietor of [The Silver Wolf](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/the-silver-wolf.md>); agreed to craft him a silver wolf for his sign. Wander the streets and get the lay of the land; have an elaborate dinner at [Roman](<../../people/other-humans/roman.md>)'s expense.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 14th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Craft silver wolf; [Roman](<../../people/other-humans/roman.md>) is pleased and agrees to arrange meeting with [Lena Sorokina](<../../people/other-humans/lena-sorokina.md>) the next day.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1749 - May 3rd, 1749               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 95](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1749, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 94)*: Leave goods with [Roman](<../../people/other-humans/roman.md>) to sell at market; speak with [Lena](<../../people/other-humans/lena-sorokina.md>), who arranges contact with the [Rodnya Voknaz](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-voknaz.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 94 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-94-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 15th, 1749, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Speak with [Roman](<../../people/other-humans/roman.md>) about magic items, travel plans; arrange horses, food, and some meetings in town.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 16th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Explore [Zvervinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/zvervinka.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 17th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Explore town, scout market. Have dinner at [The Silver Wolf](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/the-silver-wolf.md>) with [Jela Drask](<../../people/other-humans/jela-drask.md>), a member of the [Rodnya Nivik](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-nivik.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 18th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Saturday market. Purchase Frostshard Shortbow, Dragonscale Cloak, Dragonhide Cloak, Dragonhide Studded Leather, and a Potion of Gaseous Form (sealed until April 28th).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 19th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Prepare to depart [Zvervinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/zvervinka.md>). Speak with [Lena](<../../people/other-humans/lena-sorokina.md>). Get travel papers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 20th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Depart [Zvervinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/zvervinka.md>), traveling with a merchant caravan, led by a local man named [Karel](<../../people/other-humans/karel.md>). Travel south along the main road, somewhat muddy but passable.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 21th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue traveling south along the road.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 22th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue traveling south along the road.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 23th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Reach [Volya](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/volya.md>), a small trading post at the confluence of the [White River](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/beyil.md>) and the [Leis](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/leis.md>) River. Part ways with [Karel](<../../people/other-humans/karel.md>), turn upriver following the road to [Vedmakov](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/vedmakov.md>), at the headwaters of the [Leis](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/leis.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 24th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue west along the [Leis](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/leis.md>). Encounter [Watcher](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/eyes-of-vedmakov.md>) patrol, show travel papers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 25th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 26th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue west. Reach [Vedmakov](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/vedmakov.md>). Pass without entering, continuing west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| April 27th, 1749 - April 30th, 1749            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Continue west, following the road to [Yamgov](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/yamgov.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 1st, 1749                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Pass [Yamgov](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/yamgov.md>), crossing the [Dalinka](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/rivers/dalinka.md>) River, and continuing overland west, towards the headquarters of the [Rodnya Voknaz](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-voknaz.md>). [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) [dreams](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/dreams-and-visions/kenzo-s-dream-of-apollyon.md>) of [Apollyon](<../../people/historical-figures/drankorian-emperors/apollyon.md>) beginning to break the enchantments imprisoning him.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 1st, 1749                                  | Used to open a rift to [Pandemonium](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/pandemonium.md>) in the middle of Chardon, destroying the scroll and causing extreme death and destruction within the city. [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) and [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) were blamed, said to be working for [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>), although it was later reveled that in fact dopplegangers created by Apollyon had carried out the attack.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Pandemonium Scroll](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/pandemonium-scroll.md>)                                             |
| May 1st, 1749                                  | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Dopplegangers of [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>), under control by [The Cleansed](<../../groups/the-cleansed.md>), attack Kylos Market and unleash the [Pandemonium Incursion in Chardon](<pandemonium-incursion-in-chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 1st, 1749                                  | The [Pandemonium Incursion in Chardon](<pandemonium-incursion-in-chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Pandemonium Incursion in Chardon](<pandemonium-incursion-in-chardon.md>)                 |
| May 2nd, 1749                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Reach headquarters of [Rodnya Voknaz](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-voknaz.md>) in the late afternoon. Have dinner with [Branek Mirov](<../../people/other-humans/branek-mirov.md>). Discuss mission to [Frostfell](<../../cosmology/energy-realms/frostfell.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1749                                  | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 96](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-96-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 96 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-96-dufr.md>)                                               |
