| May 3rd, 1749 - May 5th, 1749                  | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 97](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1749, pre-dawn                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 95)*: Awakened by a mysterious invisible visitor; discuss Urskan politics and the leadership of the [Rodnya Voknaz](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-voknaz.md>) and a possible mission west to kill the vampire [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 95 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-95-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1749, morning                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 96)*: Teleport to [Shadowkeep](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/shadowkeep.md>), the lair of [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>). Scout by various means. Release venom troll from [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>). Interrupt infernal ritual creating a contract between [Rodnya Kinzal](<../../groups/urskan-magical-organizations/rodnya-kinzal.md>) and [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 96 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-96-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1749, noon                            | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 96)*: [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) is contacted by [Lyra](<../../people/chardonians/lyra.md>), via Sending, about happenings in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>). Find secret door in ritual room, and follow it to a chamber full of magical darkness, and [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 96 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-96-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 3rd, 1749, afternoon                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 97)*: Defeat [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>). Escape the collapsing [Shadowkeep](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/shadowkeep.md>), leaving the venom troll in the ruins. Speak with [Lyra](<../../people/chardonians/lyra.md>) via *Dream*, learning of events in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 4th, 1749, morning                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 97)*: Teleport to [Voknaz Manor](<../../gazetteer/northern-green-sea/ursk/voknaz-manor.md>). Meet [Olen Vrask](<../../people/other-humans/olen-vrask.md>), who asks for patience, after taking the tokens of [Rhodar von Glauer](<../../people/other-nonhumans/rhodar-von-glauer.md>)'s defeat.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 4th, 1749, afternoon                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 97)*: Given [Jade Piece of Rai's Hand](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>) by [Olen Vrask](<../../people/other-humans/olen-vrask.md>). See [Vision of Rai and Apollyon](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/dreams-and-visions/vision-of-rai-and-apollyon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 4th, 1749, evening                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 97)*: Communicate with [Faldrak](<../../people/dwarves/faldrak-bronzehammer.md>), [Amil](<../../people/dunmari/amil.md>), and [Kethra](<../../people/dwarves/kethra.md>) on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) by *Dream.* Learn [Algerd](<../../people/giants/algerd.md>) the frost giant departed with his sister; [Kecha](<../../people/kenku/kecha.md>) left to find the [Kenku](<../../creatures/species/kenku.md>) in the ~Eastern Islands~.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1749 - May 7th, 1749                  | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 98](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1749                                  | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: A war council called by the Magistros. With the Hetari Magica pushing for war and a popular groundswell behind them, no one speaks against war. [Mitus Verina Auratan](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>) insists on following proper forms and drafts Articles of Redress to be sent to Dunmar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 5th, 1749, early morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 97)*: Teleport to [Nevium](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/nevium.md>), on the [Gulf of Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/gulf-of-chardon.md>), near the [Old Chardon Canal](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/old-chardon-canal.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 97 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-97-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1749, morning                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Sneak out of [Nevium](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/nevium.md>), in the province of [Portalia](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/portalia.md>) on their folding boat, and sail northwest across the [Gulf of Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/gulf-of-chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 5th, 1749, evening                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Sight land along the coast of the province of [Cedrano](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/cedrano.md>); anchor in a small cove for the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 6th, 1749, morning                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Explore the town of [Artevus](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/artevus.md>). Recruit [Martino](<../../people/chardonians/martino.md>), a retired fisherman, as a guide. Hire passage on [Summer's Breeze](<../../things/ships/summer-s-breeze.md>), a halfling ship captained by [Pippa Goodbarrow](<../../people/halflings/pippa-goodbarrow.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 6th, 1749, afternoon                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Sail north along the coast, with good winds. Convince halflings to sail into the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 6th, 1749, night                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Arrive in [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>) well after sunset, and anchor for the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 7th, 1749                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 98)*: Explore [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>). Speak with [Juliana Maris](<../../people/chardonians/juliana-maris.md>), a collector of merfolk artifacts. Purchase maps from [Tullus](<../../people/chardonians/tullus.md>). Fail at an attempt to scry [Milo Thistlefoot](<../../people/halflings/milo-thistlefoot.md>). Gather rumors and hear songs. Convince [Pippa](<../../people/halflings/pippa-goodbarrow.md>) and the crew of the [Summer's Breeze](<../../things/ships/summer-s-breeze.md>) to set sail before dawn, heading north.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 98 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-98-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 7th, 1749                                  | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The Magistros publishes formal declaration that Delwath, Kenzo, Riswynn, Wellby, and Seeker are enemies of the state, to be imprisoned and stripped of all gear on sight, and killed if necessary.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 8th, 1749 - May 11th, 1749                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 99](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 8th, 1749, early morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Depart [Castrella](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/castrella.md>) in the pre-dawn light, with the outgoing tide, sailing for [Calcara Island](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/calcara-island.md>) to find [Kazuro](<../../people/other-nonhumans/kazuro.md>), the stoneborn alchemist                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 8th, 1749, midday                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Reach [Calcara Island](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/calcara-island.md>); find [Kazuro](<../../people/other-nonhumans/kazuro.md>); convince him to share transformation herbs that will turn lungs to gills and back in exchange for returning later to help him build a small school and recruit students. Depart north sailing for [Tamaro Bay](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/tamaro-bay.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 9th, 1749                                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Sail northwest uneventfully.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 9th, 1749                                  | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Chardonian diplomats reach Songara and speak to Havdar, presenting the Articles of Redress. Havdar, on orders from Sura, insists on Dunmari innocence and blames dark magic. Rebuffed, the Chardonian diplomats send messages back to Chardon via magic, reporting Dunmari has refused to consider a negotiated solution.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 10th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The Magistros announces to the war council that Dunmar has refused to agree to the Articles of Redress; war is formally declared. Marius Cusico is appointed as Supreme Commander of the [Chardonian Legion](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/chardonian-legion.md>). Fausto declares that he will personally lead the elite Seventh Guard "Arcana". Emilia Vetella appointed admiral of the fleet, although the Magistros will also sail personally with the navy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 10th, 1749, midday                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Round the northernmost point of the [Apporian Peninsula](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/apporia.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 10th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Reach [Tamaro Bay](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/tamaro-bay.md>). Cure [Dorian Almare](<../../people/chardonians/dorian-almare.md>) of a oceanic curse; speak with him about [Merfolk](<../../creatures/species/merfolk.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 10th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Sail west into the [Endless Ocean](<../../gazetteer/endless-ocean.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 101](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-101-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 101 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-101-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749 - May 12th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 102](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-102-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 102 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-102-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 100](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-100-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 100 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-100-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The Imperial Navy departs Chardon with full contingent of [Windcallers](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/windcallers.md>), intending to reach Darba and the Dunmari coast in 7 days time using the windcaller's control of wind and waves to speed their journey.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749, pre-dawn                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 99)*: Reach a place with no winds and strange oceans, above a portal to the [Elemental Plane of Water](<../../cosmology/energy-realms/elemental-plane-of-water.md>). Part company with [Summer's Breeze](<../../things/ships/summer-s-breeze.md>) and dive underwater.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 99 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-99-dufr.md>)                                               |
| May 11th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 100)*: Pass through the [Sentient Ocean](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/sentient-ocean.md>) guarding the [Merfolk](<../../creatures/species/merfolk.md>) city of [Omi](<../../gazetteer/faraway-places/omi.md>). Scout the city. Find a portal to the [Elemental Plane of Water](<../../cosmology/energy-realms/elemental-plane-of-water.md>). Plan how to get past the guardian.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 100 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-100-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 101)*: Defeat the Herald of [Gazankoa](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/gazankoa.md>) guarding the portal. Enter the [Plane of Water](<../../cosmology/energy-realms/elemental-plane-of-water.md>). Defeat the [Merfolk](<../../creatures/species/merfolk.md>) guards on the far side. Find signs of [Milo Thistlefoot](<../../people/halflings/milo-thistlefoot.md>) and Tilly Brineheart and their halfling crew.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 101 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-101-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 101)*: Rest briefly on the portal platform. Follow a bioluminescent trail. Find a strange coral and rock complex encased in a bubble-like membrane. Enter; find [Milo Thistlefoot](<../../people/halflings/milo-thistlefoot.md>) and his crew.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 101 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-101-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 11th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 102)*: Rescue [Milo Thistlefoot](<../../people/halflings/milo-thistlefoot.md>), Tilly Brineheart, and other halflings. Travel to Buruli's temple to [Gazankoa](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/gazankoa.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 102 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-102-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 12th, 1749 - May 14th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 103](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 12th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The Imperial Navy reaches [Portalia](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/portalia.md>), but is forced to hold while awaiting clearing of canal wreckage caused by [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>)'s doppleganger, also under [The Cleansed](<../../groups/the-cleansed.md>) control.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 12th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 102)*: Arrive at the temple to [Gazankoa](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/gazankoa.md>). Attack Buruli, recover [Jade Piece of Rai's Hand](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>), flee to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 102 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-102-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 12th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: manage logistics in Uzgukhar                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 12th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: Depart [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>), heading southwest for the coast of the [Sea of Storms](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/sea-of-storms.md>). Contacted by [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) with news of a Wellby doppleganger rampaging as pirate in the [Nevos Sea](<../../gazetteer/nevos-and-apporia/nevos-sea.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 13th, 1749                                 | [Dust from Seeker's Doppelgänger Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/dust-from-seeker-s-doppleganger-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Dust from Seeker's Doppleganger Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/dust-from-seeker-s-doppleganger-vision.md>)     |
| May 13th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: overnight: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) makes simulacrum of [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 13th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: The past of the dust from Seeker's doppleganger is [revealed](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/dust-from-seeker-s-doppleganger-vision.md>)( recharge:: mirror)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 13th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: Resurrect [Aygul](<../../people/orcs/aygul.md>) and [Jotha](<../../people/deno-qai/jotha.md>) while traveling. Discuss dopplegangers and souls.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 13th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) is contacted by [Dwarves](<../../creatures/species/dwarves.md>) of [Tharn Todor](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/nardith/tharn-todor.md>) concerning [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>) doppleganger, and departs with [Kethra](<../../people/dwarves/kethra.md>) to deal with it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 14th, 1749 - May 16th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 104](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 14th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: Continue flying south.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 14th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 103)*: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) teleports Kenzo's simulacrum to clone Wellby's pirate ship, The Vengenace.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 103 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-103-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 14th, 1749, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>)'s scry spell reveals the victory of Kenzo's simulacrum over pirate Wellby. The simulacrum starts the journey to [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>) to provide information to [Abha](<../../people/dunmari/abha.md>) and others.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 14th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) flies over the [Garamjala Plateau](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/garamjala-plateau.md>), into the night                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 15th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: The party spots a white marble tower in the desert, and departs to investigate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 15th, 1749, late morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: The party enters the [Tower of the Colossus](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/tower-of-the-colossus.md>), and defeats the partially intact giant colossus trapped there. Further exploration reveals buried floors and a hidden treasure room.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 15th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: The party rests in the [Tower of the Colossus](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/tower-of-the-colossus.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 105](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-105-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 105 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-105-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749 - May 18th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 106](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Marius Cusico, Fausto, and the Seventh Guard reach the Yeraad border forts and join with additional troops there.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: The party enters the hidden archive, defeats a stone golem, reads some fragile scrolls, and teleports away with [treasure](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/hoards/tower-of-the-colossus-treasure.md>), returning to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) as it is now flying over the southern jungles south of the [Garamjala Plateau](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/garamjala-plateau/garamjala-plateau.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 104)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) arrives at the cliff face and caves where the last [Jade Piece of Rai's Hand](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>) seemed to be only days ago.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 104 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-104-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 105)*: Explore the cave of talking bats. Navigate through chaotic elemental dangers, fight and kill chaos elementals.
