Speak with talking fruit bats. Learn about Canopy. Visit site where the bat [Pip](<../../people/other-nonhumans/pip.md>) found the last piece of jade.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 105 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-105-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, early evening                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 105)*: Decide to travel east in [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) towards Canopy. Arrive after an hour's journey as the sun sets, scout and find a tangled mass of thorns around the tree known as Canopy or Eldest. Prepare to fight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 105 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-105-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 106)*: Battle with corrupted vines at the Eldest tree.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 16th, 1749, night                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 106)*: The Eldest tree awakens and communicates with the party.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 17th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 106)*: The party speaks to the Eldest tree, learning about the monkeys and the flying lizards. The party meets the coastal monkeys and learns about the jade's possible location in the [Sea of Storms](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/sea-of-storms.md>). On [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), the party flies into the [Sea of Storms](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/sea-of-storms.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 17th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 106)*: The party encounters the massive storm at sea and decides to rest for the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 107](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-107-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 107 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-107-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749 - May 19th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 108](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-108-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 108 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-108-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 108)*: later afternoon: Meet dragonets Ghesh, and then Megren. Learn about [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>), who has the [Jade Piece of Rai's Hand](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/jade-piece-of-rai-s-hand.md>). Head inland looking for the eldest dragonet. Reach the memorial forest, pass an elven memorial to the dead of the [Downfall Wars](<../ancient/downfall-wars.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 108 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-108-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 106)*: The party attempts and fails to explore underwater to bypass the storm; Milo volunteers to sail through the storm with the party in the folding boat. Despite damage to the boat, the party arrives at the [Circular Island](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/circular-island.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 106 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-106-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 107)*: Head inland from the beach on the [Circular Island](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/circular-island.md>); find a camp with water and food runes; reach pilgrimage location near the statue of [The Wanderer](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/mos-numena-pantheon/the-wanderer.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 107 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-107-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 18th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 108)*: Reach the summit of the central mountain; meet [Dimitaur](<../../people/pcs/great-war/companions/dimitaur.md>); discuss [Rai](<../../people/pcs/great-war/rai.md>) and plans                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 108 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-108-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749                                 | [Apollyon's Soulbinding Manacles Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-soulbinding-manacles-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Apollyon's Soulbinding Manacles Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-soulbinding-manacles-vision.md>)     |
| May 19th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 109](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 109)*: Look at [Apollyon's Soulbinding Manacles](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/apollyon-s-soulbinding-manacles.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>), seeing [Apollyon's Soulbinding Manacles Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-soulbinding-manacles-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749 - May 21th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 110](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 109)*: Depart west for [Apollyon's tower](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/apollyon-s-tower.md>) across the [Circular Island](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/circular-island.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749, noon                           | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 109)*: Reach [Apollyon's tower](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/apollyon-s-tower.md>) as ospreys; fight constructs                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 109)*: Explore [Apollyon's tower](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/apollyon-s-tower.md>); find lich chamber; destroy undead in the grand hall                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 19th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 109)*: Find Apollyon's forge, destroy void sword protecting it. Load Apollyon's throne into Portable Hole, along with [Apollyon's Tower Treasure](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/hoards/apollyon-s-tower-treasure.md>). Teleport back to [Dimitaur](<../../people/pcs/great-war/companions/dimitaur.md>) at the summit of the mountain.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 109 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-109-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 20th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Talk to [Revaka](<../../people/other-nonhumans/revaka.md>) in the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>); discuss how to approach [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>); depart to speak with Ghesh and Megren.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 20th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Audience with [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>). Negotiate for jade. Scout ruined village; find probable location of fiend. Trade for jade and give [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>) Apollyon's Throne. Enter villa; fight fiend; recover [Cloudspinner](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/cloudspinner.md>)'s trapped body.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 20th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Flee to Dimitaur's lair in the temple complex; discuss situation and prepare to fight [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749 - May 22th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 111](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-111-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 111 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-111-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: The [Old Chardon Canal](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/old-chardon-canal.md>) is cleared for passage; the Imperial Navy begins to sail. Windcallers work in shifts around the clock to guarantee smooth waters and following winds.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749, predawn                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Find Dragonets scouting, send them off with word that Ra'ghemdros will die. Repair light tower in center of temple complex. Fight minions. Fight Ra'ghemdros. Win.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Recover [treasure](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/hoards/ra-ghemdros-hoard.md>) from [Ra'ghemdros](<../../people/other-nonhumans/ra-ghemdros.md>)' lair, turn over some [treasure](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/hoards/ra-ghemdros-hoard.md>) to [Dimitaur](<../../people/pcs/great-war/companions/dimitaur.md>) and leave him in charge. Sail through storm with Milo and Tilly.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 110)*: Arrive back on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 110 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-110-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 21th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 111)*: Set course for [Drankor](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/drankor.md>), and discuss plans.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 111 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-111-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 112](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-112-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 112 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-112-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 113](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-113-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 113 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-113-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749 - May 23th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 114](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-114-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 114 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-114-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Chardonian forces launch a probing attack into Songara, harrying Dunmari calvary. At night, some shadowy assassins with sickly skin and purple veins running from their eyes send by Fausto and the Seventh Guard sneak into Dunmar camp and kill indiscriminately. Driven off, but flee faster than a galloping horse to the east, towards the population center of Tokra.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 111)*: Arrive on the outskirts of [Drankor](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/drankor.md>). Scout in [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) Prepare to attack dopplengagers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 111 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-111-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 112)*: Teleport to the Sapphire Tower of the Teeth of Drankor. Defeat Bizarro Delwath. Engage dopplegangers, and win. Return to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 112 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-112-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 113)*: Explore the [Temple of the Eight Divines](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/temple-of-the-eight-divines.md>), and find [Apollyon's Phylactery](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/apollyon-s-phylactery.md>). Make plans to destroy it. Recover tokens from four of the seven souls bound within. Suspect trouble with [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 113 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-113-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 22th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 114)*: The party rests in the Temple of the Eight Divines in Drankor.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 114 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-114-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749 - May 24th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 115](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Sura updates Dunmari Fellowship on events at the border via Sending Stone. Havdar departs with elite calvary to chase shadow assassins. Scouts report Chardonian legions massing for a full-scale assault supported by the battle wizards of the Seventh Guard. Delwath contacts the stoneborn Drikod in the southern Sentinels, requesting aid for Tokra. Drikod musters a small force of elite Stoneborn warriors, who depart immediately.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 114)*: Leaving Wellby to guard the phylactery, the party travels to the docks, and finds [The Laughing Wave](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/the-laughing-wave.md>), recovering tokens of Seraphina Appleblossom. In the nearby Customs House, they find a shipping manifest connected to Khemut of Targu, and a clue about Minarith.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 114 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-114-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749, midday                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 114)*: The party returns to the Temple of the Eight Divines.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 114 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-114-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 115)*: The party explores the [University of the Blessed Waters](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/university-of-the-blessed-waters.md>), recovering a token associated with Minarith. Seeker teleports the party to [Philosopher's Guild](<../../groups/tollen-guilds/ancient-and-honorable-guild-of-philosophers.md>) in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749, late afternoon                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 115)*: The party requests information about the [Land of the Dead](<../../cosmology/land-of-the-dead.md>) from the [Philosopher's Guild](<../../groups/tollen-guilds/ancient-and-honorable-guild-of-philosophers.md>). [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) speaks with [Melindir](<../../people/elves/melindir.md>). [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) find a body to use as a material component for _Plane Shift_.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 23th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 115)*: The party speaks with the [Philosopher's Guild](<../../groups/tollen-guilds/ancient-and-honorable-guild-of-philosophers.md>), receiving information about the [Land of the Dead](<../../cosmology/land-of-the-dead.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 116](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-116-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 116 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-116-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749 - May 30th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 117](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Sustained assault of Songara by Chardonian forces begins. The Dunmar Fellowship defeats Fausto in Drankor. Kenzo takes control of the [Crown of Purity](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/crown-of-purity.md>) and orders Marius Cusico to surrender outside Songara. Sura reports confusion among the Chardonian Legions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 115)*: Riswynn uses _Plane Shift_ to bring the party to the [Land of the Dead](<../../cosmology/land-of-the-dead.md>). The party frees the souls tied to [Apollyon's Phylactery](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/apollyon-s-phylactery.md>), destroying it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749, late morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 115)*: Travel along the Rainbow Bridge to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), returning to the [Material Plane](<../../cosmology/material-plane.md>). Encounter charmed crew, under a suggestion from [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>). Break charm. Teleport to [Temple of the Eight Divines](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/temple-of-the-eight-divines.md>), where [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>) waits.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 115 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-115-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749, midday                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 116)*: Fight [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>) and his allies. Take the [Crown of Purity](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/crown-of-purity.md>) and defeat [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>). Debate morality of the crown.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 116 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-116-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749, early afternoon                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 116)*: Travel to [Apollyon's temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>). Fly over the red mist, enter. Face off against Apollyon, who flees after killing [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) with a word.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 116 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-116-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 24th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Revive [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>). Descend through [Apollyon](<../../people/historical-figures/drankorian-emperors/apollyon.md>)'s lair under his temple. Face [Apollyon](<../../people/historical-figures/drankorian-emperors/apollyon.md>), and defeat him. Retreat to the main hall of [Apollyon's Temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>) as the undercrypt collapses. Rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 25th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Remain in the Temple waiting for the [Cha'mutte](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/cha-mutte.md>)'s prison to fail. Receive news from [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) that Chardonian forces are in full retreat across the [Myraeni Gap](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/myraeni-gap.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 25th, 1749                                 | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Imperial Navy wins a victory outside Darba, and enters the city. [Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>) sues for peace. A 48-hour armistice is declared after the victory.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| May 26th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Remain in [Apollyon's Temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>). Receive news from [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) that [Mitus Verina Auratan](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>), commanding the Chardonian navy, has won a great victory outside [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>) and has entered the city. [Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>) sues for peace.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 26th, 1749 - May 27th, 1749                | [Mawar Adventures Episode 05](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/episodes/mawar-adventures-episode-05.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Mawar Adventures Episode 05](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/episodes/mawar-adventures-episode-05.md>)                           |
| May 26th, 1749, evening                        | *(Mawar Adventures Episode 05)*: [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>) arrives in [Hamri](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/hamri.md>) and asks the party to find the ocean's lost song in a collapsed [shrine of Guzo](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/shrine-to-guzo-the-mariner.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Mawar Adventures Episode 05](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/episodes/mawar-adventures-episode-05.md>)                           |
| May 26th, 1749, evening                        | [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>) arrives in Hamri and asks the party to find the ocean's lost song in a collapsed [shrine of Guzo](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/shrine-to-guzo-the-mariner.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | 01-session-info                                                   |
| May 26th, 1749, evening                        | [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>) arrives in Hamri and asks the party to find the ocean's lost song in a collapsed [shrine of Guzo](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/shrine-to-guzo-the-mariner.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | 02-technical-updates                                         |
| May 27th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Remain in [Apollyon's Temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>).
