Receive news via [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>)'s control of the [Crown of Purity](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/crown-of-purity.md>) of violent uprisings among chalyte workers in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 27th, 1749                                 | *(Mawar Adventures Episode 05)*: The party sails with [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>) to the [North Cliffs](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/north-cliffs.md>), finds [Guzo's buried shrine](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/mawar-confederacy/shrine-to-guzo-the-mariner.md>), kills the trapped [marid](<../../creatures/extraplanar/marid.md>), and returns the freed [song fragment](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/items-and-treasure/crystallized-song-fragment.md>) to [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Mawar Adventures Episode 05](<../../campaigns/mawar-adventures/episodes/mawar-adventures-episode-05.md>)                           |
| May 27th, 1749                                 | The party sails with [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>) to the North Cliff, finds Guzo's buried shrine, kills the trapped marid, and returns the freed song fragment to [Rayna](<../../people/mawarans/rayna.md>).

| May 28th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Remain in [Apollyon's Temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 29th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Remain in [Apollyon's Temple](<../../gazetteer/drankorian-hinterland/drankor/apollyon-s-temple.md>). Receive news that [Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>) is negotiating with [Mitus Verina Auratan](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>), but [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) refuses to cede any territory of [Central Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/central-dunmar.md>) or [Eastern Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/eastern-dunmar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |

| May 30th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Cha'mutte's prison for Apollyon finally breaks, and the party returns to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) to debate the fate of the [Crown of Purity](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/crown-of-purity.md>) and their next steps.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 30th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 117)*: Look at the [Crown of Purity](<../../things/artifacts-of-power/crown-of-purity.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>), seeing the [Crown of Purity Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/crown-of-purity-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 117 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-117-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 30th, 1749                                 | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 118](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-118-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 118 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-118-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 30th, 1749 - May 31th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 119](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-119-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 119 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-119-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 30th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 118)*: [Lirien](<../../people/fey/lirien.md>) arrives on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) seeking [Cloudspinner](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/cloudspinner.md>). Meets the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>). [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) is possessed by [Lady Eventide](<../../people/fey/lady-eventide.md>). Fey creatures serving [Wend](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/wend.md>) and [Harrow](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/harrow.md>) arrive soon after, and attack. They are defeated, but [Lirien](<../../people/fey/lirien.md>) is killed.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 118 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-118-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 30th, 1749, night                          | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 119)*: The party rests on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 119 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-119-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 31th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 119)*: Travel to [Bitterwine Oak](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/bitterwine-oak.md>), a [Feywild](<../../cosmology/feywild.md>) portal and pass through into [Emberwine](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/emberwine.md>). Meet satyrs; a barge of [Fey](<../../creatures/fey/fey.md>) on a river of wine; and a rabbit-like creature called [Auntie Mulberry](<../../people/fey/auntie-mulberry.md>). Travel towards [Sunwine Hall](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/sunwine-hall.md>) and the court of the Master of Revels.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 119 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-119-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 31th, 1749 - June 7th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 120](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-120-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 120 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-120-dufr.md>)                                             |
| May 31th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 120)*: Reach [Sunwine Hall](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/sunwine-hall.md>), meet [Lord Soven](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/lord-soven.md>), speak with guests, including [Valeris](<../../people/fey/valeris.md>), [Ismara](<../../people/fey/ismara.md>), and  [Count Vashan](<../../people/fey/count-vashan.md>). [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) duels [Arendel](<../../people/fey/arendel.md>) and loses.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 120 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-120-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 1st, 1749 - June 6th, 1749                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 120)*: Remain at [Sunwine Hall](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/sunwine-hall.md>), telling stories and making plans. [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) tames a wyvern released from the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 120 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-120-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 7th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 120)*: Depart [Sunwine Hall](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/sunwine-hall.md>) for the Sunset Gate                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 120 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-120-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 8th, 1749 - June 13th, 1749               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 121](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 8th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Travel across [Emberwine](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/emberwine.md>) towards the Sunset Gate                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 9th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Travel across [Emberwine](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/emberwine/emberwine.md>) towards the Sunset Gate                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 10th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Reach the Sunset Gate and turn north                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 11th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Travel north towards [Amberglow](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/amberglow.md>), following the Sunset Gate                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 12th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Cross into [Amberglow](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/amberglow.md>), avoiding cursed giants demanding blood, and continue north                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 13th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 121)*: Encounter and defeat hunters from Duskmire. Travel north, passing a dry river, and reaching [Redsun Watch](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/redsun-watch.md>), which is encased in darkness flowing like a river from the east.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 121 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-121-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 13th, 1749                                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 122](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-122-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 122 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-122-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 13th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 122)*: later: Infiltrate [Redsun Watch](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/redsun-watch.md>), avoiding or defeating the minions of [Harrow](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/harrow.md>) and [Wend](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/wend.md>), and light the [Cloudspinner](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/cloudspinner.md>)'s beacon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 122 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-122-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 13th, 1749 - June 14th, 1749              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 123](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-123-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 123 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-123-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 13th, 1749, night                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 123)*: Flee [Redsun Watch](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/redsun-watch.md>) seeking the [Prismwell](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/prismwell.md>), chased by shadow beasts from [Hollowdark](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/hollowdark.md>). Enter [Prismwell](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/feywild/amberglow/prismwell.md>). Free [Cloudspinner](<../../people/extraplanar-powers/archfey/cloudspinner.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 123 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-123-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 14th, 1749 - June 27th, 1749              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 124](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 14th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 123)*: Rainbow Bridge to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>); arrive over [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 123 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-123-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 14th, 1749, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: Stay at [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>); relax with the crew of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>); speak to [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) via Sending Stone. In the evening, contact [Xavier](<../../people/chardonians/xavier.md>) in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) via *Dream*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 15th, 1749 - June 17th, 1749              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: Rest and plan at [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 16th, 1749                                | [Apollyon's Crystal Ball Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-crystal-ball-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Apollyon's Crystal Ball Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-crystal-ball-vision.md>)                     |
| June 16th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: Look at Apollyon's Crystal Ball in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>), seeing [Apollyon's Crystal Ball Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/apollyon-s-crystal-ball-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 18th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Riswynn](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/riswynn.md>), [Aygul](<../../people/orcs/aygul.md>), [Nuzkar](<../../people/orcs/nuzkar.md>), and [Kethra](<../../people/dwarves/kethra.md>) teleport to [Uzgukhar](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/xurkhaz/uzgukhar.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 18th, 1749, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) departs [Pava and Avaras' House](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/hara-basin/pava-and-avaras-house.md>), heading west to [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 19th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) crosses over [Karawa](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/eastern-dunmar/karawa.md>) in the morning. Free [Vola](<../../people/chardonians/vola.md>), [Valius](<../../people/chardonians/valius.md>), and [Vargus](<../../people/chardonians/vargus.md>) from the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>). Speak to [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>) via *Dream*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 20th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) crosses over [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>) in the morning. Leave [Valius](<../../people/chardonians/valius.md>) and [Vargus](<../../people/chardonians/vargus.md>), with some coin and a letter of introduction, in [Tokra](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/tokra/tokra.md>). [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) begins speaking with [Hektor](<../../people/chardonians/hektor.md>) in the [Mirror of Soul Trapping](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-soul-trapping.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 21th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) crosses over [Songara](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/central-dunmar/songara.md>), and turns west.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 22th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) reaches the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 23th, 1749                                | [Elemental Forge Spellbook Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/elemental-forge-spellbook-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Elemental Forge Spellbook Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/elemental-forge-spellbook-vision.md>)                 |
| June 23th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) reaches the western edge of the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 23th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: Look at the spellbook recovered from the [Elemental Forge](<../../gazetteer/western-green-sea/cymea/elemental-forge.md>) in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>), seeing [Elemental Forge Spellbook Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/elemental-forge-spellbook-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 24th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) reaches the [Yeraad](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/rivers/yeraad.md>) delta, near the coast. Wait for darkness.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 24th, 1749, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) heads northwest from the [Yeraad](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/rivers/yeraad.md>), crossing over the [Old Chardon Canal](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/old-chardon-canal.md>) in darkness.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 25th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) lands on an isolated stretch of coast in [Portalia](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/portalia.md>); hide for the day under *Hallucinatory Terrain*.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 25th, 1749, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) sets out north into the [Gulf of Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/gulf-of-chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 26th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) travels across the [Gulf of Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/gulf-of-chardon.md>) towards [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749                                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 125](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-125-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 125 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-125-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749 - June 29th, 1749              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 126](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-126-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 126 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-126-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 124)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) reaches a holding point off the coast of [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>), about 150 miles northwest of the city. The party prepares to teleport to [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 124 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-124-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749, late morning                  | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 125)*: Arrive in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>). Speak with [Xavier](<../../people/chardonians/xavier.md>) and his family in the [Chalyte Levels](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chalyte-levels.md>). Send a lynx messenger to the [Magistros](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 125 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-125-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 125)*: Meet [Andros](<../../people/chardonians/andros.md>), [Iveila the Red](<../../people/chardonians/iveila-the-red.md>), and [Orsino](<../../people/chardonians/orsino.md>), members of the [Eightfold Flame](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/eightfold-flame.md>), at  [The Cackling Swan](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/the-cackling-swan.md>), discuss revolutionary politics. Receive message to meet [Tiberius](<../../people/chardonians/tiberius.md>), a [Windcaller](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/windcallers.md>) in the [Magistros](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>)' service.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 125 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-125-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749, evening                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 125)*: Convince [Tiberius](<../../people/chardonians/tiberius.md>) they are not clones or possessed by [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>) or in league with [The Cleansed](<../../groups/the-cleansed.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 125 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-125-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 27th, 1749, night                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 126)*: The party spends the evening separately, with [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) lodging on the [Auratan's Pride](<../../things/ships/auratan-s-pride.md>) and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) lodging at the [The Smiling Crab](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/the-smiling-crab.md>), a [halfling](<../../creatures/species/halflings.md>) inn near the port of [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 126 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-126-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 28th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 126)*: The party gathers information via scrying and divination. [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) and [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) speak to [Gaspar](<../../people/chardonians/gaspar.md>), a high official in the [Chamber of Stamps](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/chamber-of-stamps.md>) recently released from [Fausto](<../../people/chardonians/fausto.md>)'s mind control. [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) gathers rumors on the docks.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 126 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-126-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 29th, 1749 - July 4th, 1749               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 127](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 29th, 1749, morning                       | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 126)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) meets with [Mitus Verina Auratan](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>) and agrees to seek a new source of [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>) in the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 126 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-126-dufr.md>)                                             |
