| June 29th, 1749, afternoon                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) makes plans to journey to the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>) in search of [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| June 30th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) gathers [information about chalyte](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/letters-and-notes/reports-on-chalyte-in-alta-tonaro.md>) in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 1st, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) travels to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), waiting offshore, and prepares to depart for the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 1st, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) departs south towards the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 2nd, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) travels across the [Gulf of Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/gulf-of-chardon.md>) and [Portalia](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/portalia.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 3rd, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) travels across the [Yeraad Watershed](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/yeraad-watershed/yeraad-watershed.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749 - July 5th, 1749                | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 128](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-128-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 128 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-128-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) arrives in [Alta Tonaro](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/alta-tonaro.md>) at first light.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749, late morning                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) scouts the [stone giant settlement](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/ulgrathar.md>) in the [Chataan Mountains](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chataan-mountains.md>) in the [Riftstone Gorge](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/riftstone-gorge.md>), the valley below [Thundercrown](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/thundercrown.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) sneaks into the [stone giant settlement](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/ulgrathar.md>) and uses magic to suborn an ogre.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 127)*: The [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) speaks with a [disaffected stone giant](<../../people/giants/brunnar.md>) and makes a tentative alliance, then teleports back to [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) to rest for the night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 127 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-127-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 4th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 128)*: Rest on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) and plan for the attack the following morning.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | [Session 128 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-128-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 5th, 1749 - August 7th, 1749              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 129](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 5th, 1749, morning                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 128)*: Teleport to [Dhrukmir](<../../people/giants/dhrukmir.md>)'s Lightning Tower, defeat the stone [giant](<../../creatures/species/giants.md>) and [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>) guards; descend into the tower and destroy the [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>) mirror powering the lightning chains holding it up; flee the falling tower; face and defeat the 70-foot tall [giant](<../../creatures/species/giants.md>) [Dhrukmir](<../../people/giants/dhrukmir.md>) and his [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>) weapons.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 128 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-128-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 5th, 1749, afternoon                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) gathers [chalyte](<../../things/materials/chalyte.md>) shards as [Brunnar](<../../people/giants/brunnar.md>) and the stone giants declare their freedom.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 5th, 1749, evening                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: On [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), [Octavia Antussus](<../../people/chardonians/octavia-antussus.md>) departs for [Argento](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/alta-tonaro/argento.md>) and [Tristan Brighteyes](<../../people/chardonians/tristan-brighteyes.md>) for [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>); [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) bargains by dream with the [Magistros](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>), who outlines plans for a new Chalyte Refining Corporation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 6th, 1749 - July 8th, 1749                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) flies to Chardon.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 9th, 1749                                 | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: Arrival in [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>); [Magistros](<../../people/chardonians/mitus-verina-auratan.md>) proclaims the [Imperial Chalyte Mining Company](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/imperial-chalyte-mining-company.md>), seizes oligarch lands, and grants [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) ruined properties in [Ragwater Basin](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/ragwater-basin.md>) and the [Riverside Quarter](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/riverside-quarter.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 10th, 1749 - August 6th, 1749             | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) helps found theChalyte Refining Corporation with equal seats for the Guild of Chalyte Workers and [Windcallers](<../../groups/chardonian-organizations/windcallers.md>); [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) pursues rumors of the elves, [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) and [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>) study the [Plane of Fire](<../../cosmology/energy-realms/elemental-plane-of-fire.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 25th, 1749                                | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: Peace treaty with [Dunmar](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/dunmar.md>) concluded: [Darba](<../../gazetteer/greater-dunmar/realms/dunmar/coastal-dunmar/darba/darba.md>) ceded as free port, [Chardonian Empire](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardonian-empire.md>) pays reconstruction fee, realm split between [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) and [Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| July 25th, 1749                                | *(Chardon-Dunmar War)*: Formal peace between the [Chardonian Empire](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardonian-empire.md>), [Nayan Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>), and [Nayan Karnas](<../../people/dunmari/nayan-karnas.md>) ends the Chardon-Dunmar war, divides Dunmar between [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>) and Karnas, and establishes the free port of Darba under Chardonian suzerainty.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | [Chardon-Dunmar War](<chardon-dunmar-war.md>)                                             |
| August 1st, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Hektor](<../../people/chardonians/hektor.md>), recovered enough from his long mind control ordeal, joins the crew of [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 2nd, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Vola](<../../people/chardonians/vola.md>) departs [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) for [Apporia](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/apporia.md>), seeking healing from her betrayal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 6th, 1749, afternoon                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Wellby](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/wellby.md>)’s sending stone carries [Sura](<../../people/dunmari/sura.md>)’s warning: [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>) reports a hobgoblin host beneath an ash cloud approaching [Refounded Alliance of Aurbez](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez.md>). Fellowship departs [Chardon](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardon/chardon.md>) at once on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 6th, 1749, night                        | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) dreams with [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>); [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) teleports the party to the [Aursen Marshes](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/aursen-marshes.md>), meeting [Marcella](<../../people/chardonians/marcella.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 7th, 1749                               | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 130](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-130-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 130 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-130-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 7th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 130)*: Interrogate [Szoltár](<../../people/other-nonhumans/szoltar.md>), travel to [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>), learn of the Heartroot and [Isingue](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/isingue.md>)'s secret, and plan the defense of the [Refounded Alliance of Aurbez](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez.md>) from the Iron Fang armies.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 130 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-130-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 7th, 1749                               | *(Martin Strongbow)*: [Called the council](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-130-dufr.md>) at [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>) to order and helped shape the Alliance’s defensive response to the [Empress of Chaos](<../../people/other-nonhumans/empress-of-chaos.md>)'s threat.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Martin Strongbow](<../../people/aurbeze/martin-strongbow.md>)                                                 |
| August 7th, 1749                               | *(Perrin du Bois)*: Joined the war council at [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>), where he cautioned against plans that gambled civilian safety on uncertain outcomes, while acknowledging the need to protect the Heartroot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | [Perrin du Bois](<../../people/aurbeze/perrin-du-bois.md>)                                                     |
| August 7th, 1749                               | *(Cateline Malras)*: Joined the war council in [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>), called to organize the [Refounded Alliance of Aurbez](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez.md>) response to the [Empress of Chaos](<../../people/other-nonhumans/empress-of-chaos.md>)'s armies. Met the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) and told them of the Heartroot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Cateline Malras](<../../people/aurbeze/cateline-malras.md>)                                                   |
| August 7th, 1749, dawn                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: Scouts the [Plaguelands](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/plaguelands.md>), discovering a vast chaos-metal centipede bearing thousands of hobgoblins. At the rear of the column, [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) drops riders with sleep; the party captures [Szoltár](<../../people/other-nonhumans/szoltar.md>) before teleporting back to the [Aursen Marshes](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/aursen-marshes.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 7th, 1749, morning                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 129)*: The party interrogates [Szoltár](<../../people/other-nonhumans/szoltar.md>) under magical compulsion.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 129 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-129-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 8th, 1749 - August 10th, 1749           | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 131](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 8th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 131)*: dusk: As eagles the party approaches the marching column of hobgoblins; [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) uses Wish to cast a tsunami, smashing the vanguard; they Teleport out and later scry heavy casualties.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 8th, 1749, dawn                         | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 131)*: [Kenzo](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/kenzo.md>) communes with the Heartroot near [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>), sensing a fertile mind exiled from the [Istaros](<../../gazetteer/major-rivers/istaros-watershed/istaros.md>). party consults [Revaka](<../../people/other-nonhumans/revaka.md>), who counsels that hobgoblins follow only proven strength                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 9th, 1749                               | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 131)*: Observe hobgoblin camp under an ash cap; an earthquake tears along its edge as [Delwath](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/delwath.md>) broadcasts a  challenge, before the party withdraws.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 9th, 1749, evening                      | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 131)*: Scrying the march, they witness the Empress’s speech promising day-and-night advance under Limbo’s power; morale wavers but the column pushes on.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 10th, 1749                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 131)*: Party attacks army inside centipede, then quickly flee. Scrying reveals chaos-sorcerers shoring morale among roughly 3,000 survivors as the host drives toward the escarpment and the Heartroot.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 131 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-131-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 10th, 1749 - August 12th, 1749          | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 132](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 132 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 10th, 1749                              | *(Martin Strongbow)*: [Coordinated defenses](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>) of the Heartroot with the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>) via dream counsel.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Martin Strongbow](<../../people/aurbeze/martin-strongbow.md>)                                                 |
| August 10th, 1749, evening                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 132)*: The party camps at [Three Wells](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/refounded-alliance-of-aurbez/three-wells.md>) for the night, and plans defenses with [Martin Strongbow](<../../people/aurbeze/martin-strongbow.md>) via Dream.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Session 132 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 11th, 1749                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 132)*: [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) creates a new simulacrum, [Seeker](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/seeker.md>) 5; [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) arrives.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Session 132 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 11th, 1749, evening                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 132)*: [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>) attacks hobgoblins as they ascend the escarpment to the [Aurbez Plateau](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/aurbez-plateau.md>); the party captures a worm-snake made of chaos metal from Limbo. After the battle, the party teleports to the Heartroot valley camp and the first volunteers are transformed into hippos.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 132 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749                              | The [Heartroot Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/heartroot-vision.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Heartroot Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/heartroot-vision.md>)                                                 |
| August 12th, 1749                              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 133](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-133-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 133 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-133-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749                              | [Dunmari Frontier - Session 134](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-134-dufr.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 134 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-134-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749                              | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 134)*: Look the Heartroot  in the [Mirror of the Past](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/treasure/mirror-of-the-past.md>), seeing [Heartroot Vision](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/mirror-visions/heartroot-vision.md>) recharge mirror                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Session 134 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-134-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749                              | The [Battle of Heartroot Vale](<battle-of-heartroot-vale.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Battle of Heartroot Vale](<battle-of-heartroot-vale.md>)                                 |
| August 12th, 1749                              | *(Martin Strongbow)*: Led [Rangers](<../../groups/rangers.md>) into battle to defend the Heartroot against the [Empress of Chaos](<../../people/other-nonhumans/empress-of-chaos.md>) and her armies. [Emerged victorious](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-133-dufr.md>) with the aid of the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Martin Strongbow](<../../people/aurbeze/martin-strongbow.md>)                                                 |
| August 12th, 1749                              | *(Cateline Malras)*: Performed rites to the [Fox and Hunter](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/fox-and-hunter.md>) in aid of the [Dunmar Fellowship](<../../people/pcs/dunmar-fellowship/dunmar-fellowship.md>)'s quest; seeking guidance regarding the planar nature of [Isingue](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/isingue.md>)'s blight and the influence of [Limbo](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/limbo.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Cateline Malras](<../../people/aurbeze/cateline-malras.md>)                                                   |
| August 12th, 1749, pre-dawn                    | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 132)*: The party prepares for the hobgoblin attack in the pre-dawn light. The battle is joined as the sun begins to rise. Vindristjarna is lured out of position by a feint of flying hawks with mounted hobgoblins. The party realizes the Empress of Chaos is flying past and has no choice but to Teleport to the Heartroot to defend it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Session 132 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-132-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749, morning                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 133)*: The Dunmar Fellowship defeats the Empress of Chaos at the Heartroot valley; Kenzo shape-shifts into a silver dragon; the elemental cataclysm of Limbo energy that emerges from the Empress' destroyed body is destroyed, and the defenders of Aurbez are victorious.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Session 133 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-133-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749, afternoon                   | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 134)*: The party rests and regroups in the aftermath of the [Battle of Heartroot Vale](<battle-of-heartroot-vale.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | [Session 134 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-134-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 12th, 1749, evening                     | *(Dunmari Frontier - Session 134)*: The party communes with the Heartroot and speaks with the [Fox and Hunter](<../../gods-and-religions/gods/incorporeal-gods/fox-and-hunter.md>) via [Cateline Malras](<../../people/aurbeze/cateline-malras.md>), learning about the corruption of [Limbo](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/limbo.md>) in [Isingue](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/isingue.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | [Session 134 (DuFr)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/session-134-dufr.md>)                                             |
| August 13th, 1749 - September 14th, 1749       | [Interlude: Preparations for Limbo](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| August 13th, 1749                              | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Depart the [Aurbez Plateau](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/aurbez-plateau.md>) on [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>), heading for [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>). Pass over the [Aurbez Plateau](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/aurbez-plateau.md>) and the [March of Andonne](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/duchy-of-maseau/march-of-andonne.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| August 14th, 1749                              | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Arrive at [Valarin](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/duchy-of-maseau/valarin.md>), the  capital of the [Duchy of Maseau](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/duchy-of-maseau/duchy-of-maseau.md>), in the morning. Turn northeast, crossing over the [Duchy of Maseau](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/duchy-of-maseau/duchy-of-maseau.md>) and the [Sembaran Borderlands](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/borderlands/borderlands.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
