| August 15th, 1749                              | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Cross the [Enst](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/rivers/wistel-enst-watershed/enst.md>) near [Fellburn](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/heartlands/fellburn.md>) in the morning, and continue northeast across the [Duchy of Wisford](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/heartlands/duchy-of-wisford.md>) and the [Duchy of Sembara](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/heartlands/duchy-of-sembara.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| August 16th, 1749                              | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Arrive at [Embry](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/heartlands/embry.md>), the royal seat of [Sembara](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/sembara.md>), just after dawn. Continue northeast over the [Duchy of Arnsbury](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/heartlands/duchy-of-arnsbury.md>). Cross the [Teft](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/rivers/teft-watershed/teft.md>) into the [Duchy of Telham](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/sembara/northlands/duchy-of-telham.md>) over night.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| August 17th, 1749                              | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Arrive in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>) around lunchtime. Reconnect with [Adam Gower](<../../people/tollenders/adam-gower.md>), [Iskra](<../../people/skaer/iskra.md>), and others in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>). Dock [Vindristjarna](<../../things/ships/vindristjarna.md>). Speak with members of the [Philosopher's Guild](<../../groups/tollen-guilds/ancient-and-honorable-guild-of-philosophers.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| August 18th, 1749 - September 10th, 1749       | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Conduct research in [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>) concerning [Limbo](<../../cosmology/spiritual-realms/limbo.md>), [Isingue](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/isingue.md>), and other topics.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| September 11th, 1749                           | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Depart [Tollen](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tollen/tollen.md>), heading southeast towards [Erelion](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/erelion.md>), the main city of the elven kingdom of [Orenlas](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/orenlas.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| September 12th, 1749                           | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Cross the [Western Gulf](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/western-gulf.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| September 13th, 1749                           | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Cross [Latazaro](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/latazaro.md>), a large wetlands and lizardfolk community on the eastern border of [Tyrwingha](<../../gazetteer/greater-sembara/tyrwingha/tyrwingha.md>), and continue southeast towards [Orenlas](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/orenlas.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| September 14th, 1749, late morning             | *(Interlude: Preparations for Limbo)*: Arrive at [Erelion](<../../gazetteer/upper-istaros/orenlas/erelion.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | [Interlude (Preparations for Limbo)](<../../campaigns/dunmari-frontier-campaign/session-notes/interlude-preparations-for-limbo.md>)             |
| June 28th, 1752                                | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>), [Adrik](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/adrik.md>), and [Mabist](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/mabist.md>), along with the lizardfolk dreamers, and [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>), awake in [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>); the native inhabitants still slumber. Leave [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>) via the [Enderra](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/enderra.md>) portal. Learn of chaos in [Voltara](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/northern-provinces/voltara/voltara.md>) and the splitting of the [Northern Provinces](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/northern-provinces/northern-provinces.md>) from the [Chardonian Empire](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/chardonian-empire.md>). Attempt to _Transport Via Plants_ to [Tempest Towers](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/tempest-towers.md>), but fail.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
| June 29th, 1752                                | *(Chronicles of the Quest for Answers to Extraplanar Mysteries)*: Arrive in [Urkabi](<../../gazetteer/greater-chardon/chardonian-empire/apporia/urkabi.md>) with lizardfolk rescued from [Cairn Dor](<../../gazetteer/extraplanar/shadowfolds/cairn-dor.md>). [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>) parts ways with his family and kin, who are eternally grateful. [Adrik](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/adrik.md>), [Samso](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/samso.md>), [Mabist](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/mabist.md>), and [Blue](<../../people/pcs/silver-tempests/blue.md>) _Transport Via Plants_ to an orchard outside [Voltara](<../../gazetteer/northwest-coast/northern-provinces/voltara/voltara.md>).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | [Great Library Session Notes - Arc 5](<../../campaigns/great-library-campaign/session-notes/great-library-session-notes-arc-5.md>)           |
